Pound-for-Pound Boxing for All - Intuitive, pick-up-and-play controls - Robust boxing mechanics - Dynamic boxing styles and combos - Fighter-specific super finishers for cinematic knockouts Ultimate Creed & Rocky Boxing Universe - Legendary tales of 20 iconic and unique characters - Unlockable characters and outfits - Classic Creed and Rocky training moments in thematic mini games - 13 Classic and original boxing arenas Iconic Champs from Creed & Rocky - Adonis Creed - Rocky Balboa - Apollo Creed - Clubber Lang - Ivan Drago - Viktor Drago and more... Pulse-rousing Fun with Friends and Family - Choose your champion and venues - Face off in local player-versus-player mode Developed by the team who brought you Creed: Rise to Glory for VR platforms, Big Rumble Boxing: Creed Champions is the second collaboration between Survios and MGM Studios, that brings the gripping intensity of Creed boxing to consoles and PC for the first time.

**Conscious Existence: A Virtual Reality Journey of Inner Appreciation**

"Conscious Existence" is a captivating 12-minute pre-rendered, stereoscopic 360/VR short film created by Marc Zimmermann, also known as EpicScapes. This immersive experience invites viewers on a profound journey within, exploring the gift of a conscious mind and its power to perceive the universe's boundless beauty.

**Important Warning:** This experience includes a scene with flashing, stroboscope-like effects. If you are sensitive to such stimuli, or if you or a family member has a history of epilepsy or seizures, please consult your physician before viewing.

The film is delivered with its own dedicated player, designed to ensure seamless playback of the 4096x4096px @ 60fps, high-bitrate 360/VR video file. This player is optimized for VR-enabled workstations running Windows 10, requiring an NVidia 970GTX or higher. For users on older systems (Windows 7/8), an alternative playback option is available via the 'win-7-8-alternative' beta branch.

Playback controls are intuitive and accessible:

*   **Play/Pause:** Spacebar
*   **Reset View:** 'R' key
*   **Toggle Voice:** 'L' key

These controls can be operated using VR controllers or keyboard shortcuts, provided the application window is in focus.

The core message of "Conscious Existence" revolves around the profound gift of consciousness. This ability allows us to sense and internalize the universe's infinite beauty, a wellspring of inspiration that nourishes our inner world. Our perception of reality is deeply shaped by our thought processes. Misplaced priorities can act as blinders, obscuring the ever-present beauty that surrounds us, a beauty that serves as a potent source of energy and inspiration. Cultivating a positive and grateful mindset empowers us to harness this energy, enriching our inner lives and fostering a sense of well-being.

Through this virtual reality creation, Zimmermann shares his personal appreciation for the gift of life. The film encourages viewers to rediscover the wonder of seeing the world through a child's eyes. It is intended as an inward journey, aiming to resonate emotionally and guide you towards a state of relaxed appreciation.

Name: Need for Speed™
Description:
Ready to own the streets? Get behind the wheel of iconic cars and floor it through Ventura Bay, a sprawling urban playground. Explore overlapping stories as you build your reputation – and your dream car – and become the ultimate racing icon. Play again and again because this time, you have 5 distinct ways to win. GET EXTRA IN-GAME CONTENT WHEN YOU GO WITH THE DELUXE EDITION. • Lifetime 10% discount on all items using in-game currency. • Tricked-out starter car. • Styling and Performance pack. • Exclusive wraps. • Unique Identifying Sticker. • VIP icon. GAME FEATURES: Optimized for PC. Get an unlocked frame rate and experience Need for Speed at 4K resolution, only on PC. Plus, feel the thrill of street racing with steering wheel and peripheral support from a range of manufacturers including Logitech, Thrustmaster and Fanatec. Rich authentic customization. Build a car to reflect your character with extensive visual and performance customization options. Because your ride should look as good as it handles. West Coast playground. Discover Ventura Bay. From the dense city streets to the winding roads that lead you to the harbor and through the canyons, this is your home turf. Play your way. Need for Speed returns with 5 unique ways to play: Speed, Style, Build, Crew and Outlaw, enabling you to earn reputation and ultimately win your way. Living Game. Take on Ventura Bay’s slickest street racers with free updates in Eddie’s challenge and become an expert photographer with Snapshot Pro. Plus, earn Ken Block’s Hoonicorn and Morohoshi-San’s Diablo. Be part of the story. Step into a richly created world and be part of an immersive story that takes you all over Ventura Bay.

Name: CINEVEO - VR Cinema
Description:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! DO NOT PURCHASE CINEVEO !!! CINEVEO has been discontinued and is no longer available! CINEVEO servers are offline! CINEVEO is being removed from Steam. DO NOT PURCHASE CINEVEO !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- CINEVEO is a super immersive VR Cinema experience, with the most detailed and beautifully designed VR Cinema environments on the market. Experience total presence in VR, as you watch your videos inside a collection of ultra-realistic VR Cinemas with AAA graphics. Nothing comes closer to the real thing. CINEVEO is loaded with unique features. CINEVEO has not just one VR Cinema environment. It has six! The 4D Movie Theater, the 1960 Drive-in Theater, the Ocean Theater, the Haunted Valley, the Internet Cinema and the Void. CINEVEO's 4D Movie Theater generates ambient lighting effects. The ambient lighting creates an intense atmosphere inside the theater room during movies. Both the 4D Movie Theater and the Internet Cinema have a multi-player audience. These theaters are populated with real CINEVEO users and you can see their head movements in real-time. CINEVEO is not limited to playing video files. CINEVEO's Internet Cinema has an integrated web browser that can play YouTube videos. It also has a chat room where CINEVEO users can talk, share links to YouTube videos and watch them together. Additionally, all of CINEVEO's VR Cinemas have movie subtitle support and you can customize the size and shape of the cinema screen. Several ultra-detailed and animated 3D VR Cinema environments with AAA graphics. A true VR Cinema experience with an unprecedented level of immersion. Plays all video file formats perfectly smooth (MKV, MP4, AVI, MOV, WMV, etc.). Plays 3D videos (SBS and Over / Under) with superb 3D depth perception. Crystal clear cinema screen with the best video image quality on the market. You can customize the size and shape of the cinema screen. Ambient lighting effects generate an intense atmosphere in the 4D Movie Theater & Internet Cinema during movies. Movie subtitle support (SRT format). The seats in the 4D Movie Theater & Internet Cinema are populated with a multi-player audience made up of real CINEVEO users. The Internet Cinema has an integrated web browser that can play YouTube videos. It also has a multi-player chat room where users can talk, share links to YouTube videos and watch them together. SPECIAL FEATURES Advanced dynamic lighting | CINEVEO's Stereo PFOV Lighting™ | Multiplayer audience CINEVEO’s 4D Movie Theater v4.0 is the most immersive and advanced VR Cinema simulation available for the Oculus Rift and HTC Vive. Feel total presence in your own personal movie theater and watch your videos on a huge customizable cinema screen. The 4D Movie Theater v4.0 features innovative dynamic lighting effects during movies, such as CINEVEO’s Stereo PFOV Lighting™ , which generates visual effects for any video and creates an incredible atmosphere inside the movie theater using the cinema screen’s light, color, reflections, shapes and shadows. To immerse you even further into VR, CINEVEO comes with a multiplayer mode, which can populate your movie theater with an animated live audience made up of real CINEVEO users, who are watching a movie at the same time as you. SPECIAL FEATURES Ultra-detailed 1960s drive-in movie theater setting | Sit in a 1958 Buick convertible | Air traffic and animated birds | Vertigo effect Inspired by the popular car drive-in movie theaters, that were all the rage throughout the United States in the 60s, CINEVEO’s 1960 Drive-in Theater v2.0 will let you watch your movies from the seat of an ultra-detailed 1958 Buick convertible car, with a fully modeled interior and exterior. Your car is parked in front of a gigantic cinema screen, located on a on a vast hill overseeing the Los Angeles city skyline by night. Look behind and you will spot a road-side diner with restroom building, projector tower and neon billboard. Search the sky long enough and you will spot classic Douglas DC airplanes flying over the city. The cinema screen casts dynamic lighting effects, creating an incredibly immersive atmosphere during movies. SPECIAL FEATURES Ultra-realistic ocean environment | Animated lighthouse, ships and birds | Cinema screen water reflection CINEVEO’s Ocean Theater v2.0 is an ultra-realistic and incredibly immersive VR Cinema environment, teleporting you in front of a gigantic cinema screen, located in the middle of the ocean at dawn time. Watch your movies, sitting inside a little wooden rowboat, dancing gently with the waves. Your rowboat is anchored next to a photo-realistic lighthouse with animated lights. In the distance you will see ships and flocks of birds passing by once in a while. The cinema screen casts dynamic lighting effects and its reflection shimmers on the surface of the ocean, creating a powerful atmosphere during movies. SPECIAL FEATURES Eerie environment ideal for horror movies | The ghost of little Lucy roams through the haunted valley | Get scared during movies The Haunted Valley v2.0 features an eerie environment that will give you the shivers. It's great for watching horror movies. This VR Cinema is haunted by little Lucy, the ghost of a 12 year old girl who disappeared in 1894. Lucy does not like it very much when strangers are around. Be prepared, as she will not hesitate to give you a scare once in a while. You can spot Lucy in four locations at random times if you keep your eyes peeled. Are you ready for little Lucy? SPECIAL FEATURES Integrated web browser and chat room | YouTube video support | Watch videos together | Play browser games | Multiplayer audience | CINEVEO's Stereo PFOV Lighting™ The Internet Cinema is based on the 4D Movie Theater and features an integrated web browser, a multi-player audience and a chat room. You can watch YouTube videos, surf the web and play browser games in the Internet Cinema. You can do this alone or together with other CINEVEO users. You can meet other CINEVEO users in the integrated chat room to talk, share links to YouTube videos and watch them together. SPECIAL FEATURES Just the screen and you in empty space | CINEVEO's ULTRA - 3D™ Mode The Void features a distraction free environment in pitch black darkness. The Void is the only cinema theme that currently supports viewing 3D movies in CINEVEO's ULTRA - 3D™ Mode .

Name: HEX: Shards of Fate
Description:
HEX: Shards of Fate – Magical World for Keen Card Players HEX: Shards of Fate is an exciting challenge for fans of cards, action and strategy. Explore the fabulous world of Entrath, wrestle your way through sinister dungeons and use skill and guile in matches against other players. This digital card game combines the best of two worlds: classic TCGs and online RPGs . Create powerful decks from over 1,000 unique cards and dive into epic battles. Earn equipment items and use socketing gems to further improve your deck, whilst a variety of champions with individual skills complement your card armies. Cool animations and effects enrich the gaming experience on your road to victory! Experience HEX: Shards of Fate Play the first digital TCG with RPG elements Select a champion from eight races and three classes Explore dungeons in the exciting single-player mode Put your skills to the test in 1 vs 1 matches and hone your strategies Trade cards with friends and other players Win amazing prizes in daily tournaments with up to 128 players

Name: Duelyst
Description:
DUELYST is the ultimate collectible tactics game. Head-to-head matches last between five and ten minutes, and focus on thoughtful decision-making and strategic positioning. Players are rewarded with new battle units every monthly season. Assemble your battle deck from over 800 cards across 6 unique Factions and test your mettle against other players online in ranked season ladder and draft mode tournaments. Key Features Infinite Depth : With a tactical battlefield, positioning of your units truly matters. And with over 500 battle units, no battle will ever be the same! Lightning-Fast Matches : Online matches last from five to ten minutes. Get your competitive fix anytime during the day! Competitive : Play against players of equal skill on the monthly Season Ranked Ladder. Or compete in the Gauntlet Draft Mode, where the longer you last, the better the rewards! Classic Pixel Art Aesthetic : Bright and detailed pixel art for all Generals and Cards with full 16-bit spell and effect animations. Immersive Lore : Expansive codex and history spanning 30,000 years to uncover the mysteries of the denizens of Mythron. Jump down the rabbit hole! Competitive head-to-head turn-based battles at its best!

Name: Faeria
Description:
With its unique living board, Faeria will challenge you with truly strategic card battles. Craft your deck, shape the battlefield, and fight for victory! A strategy game like no other. Build exciting decks and shape the battlefield as you fight epic battles. Raise mountains, build forests, fill lakes, or harness the sands of the deserts. You choose your own path to victory. Earn your collection through our simple and affordable DLC-based business model. Experience a card game without expensive micro-transactions. Whether through solo campaigns, draft mode, or PVP, all cards are earned through simply playing the game! Enjoy 100+ hours of solo content, co-operative missions, and puzzles! Explore a vast array of challenges that reward you in return. Journey through the Oversky and defeat devious World Bosses - or even play enemy AI in draft mode! Enter Pandora, Faeria's unique draft mode where your deck-building skills are put to the ultimate test. Choose to play against the AI or put your deck to the ultimate test in PVP. Earn rewards based on how well you do. It’s the perfect way to increase your collection, or just have fun! Become a part of our thriving, supportive, and helpful community by joining our official Discord channel, subreddit, forums - or join The Hub! Years in the making, you’ll be hard-pressed to find a more welcoming group of players. Compete in regular officially-recognized tournaments with great prizes - or watch them live and win in-game loot! Our esports system rewards players for excellent performance and allows everyone else to watch, enjoy, and gain free loot!

## KARDS: The WWII Card Game - A Strategic Deep Dive

KARDS, the World War II Card Game, masterfully blends the familiar mechanics of traditional collectible card games (CCGs) with innovative gameplay inspired by classic strategy titles and real-world battlefield tactics. This free-to-play experience puts you in command of grand-scale warfare across land, air, and sea. All cards are accessible from the outset, earnable through regular gameplay, daily missions, and an extensive achievement system.

### Why Play KARDS?

KARDS offers an accessible entry point with its familiar trading card gameplay, while simultaneously delivering **strategic depth and tactical diversity** through its unique mechanics.

#### Innovative Frontline Mechanics

A key innovation is the **frontline system**, which allows players to strategically position units to better protect their support assets and directly engage the enemy. This mechanic encourages dynamic gameplay, allowing for various strategic approaches.

#### Tactical Warfare Options

Players can choose to **rush opponents with Blitzkrieg tactics**, strive for **air superiority**, or **dig in for a protracted defensive war**, aiming to outproduce and outgun their adversaries.

### Resource Management and Deck Construction

Effective management of your forces is paramount. In KARDS, players must carefully balance their **Kredits** to deploy new units, operate existing ones on the battlefield, and issue orders to support their strategic plans.

#### Deck Archetypes

Your deck is built around one of the **five major powers of WW2**, with the option to include one allied nation for added support and strategic advantage. Players craft their decks based on a combination of units and supporting orders, tailoring them to their chosen strategy.

*   **Infantry:** Ideal for overwhelming opponents with lighter, often less costly units.
*   **Tanks:** Perfect for blitzing opponents with heavily armored forces.
*   **Artillery:** Enables players to bombard enemies from the safety of their support line.
*   **Aircraft:** Crucial for achieving air superiority and dominating the skies.

### Progression and Rewards

Advance through the ranks, from **Private to Field Marshal**, earning your place in the officer's club and receiving **monthly rewards** based on your achieved rank.

### Authentic Atmosphere

Every card in KARDS is **beautifully illustrated** in a distinct WW2 style. The weapons and units are meticulously researched, ensuring they behave as expected based on official documentation, specifications, and historical operational data.

### Continuous Development and Community

With a **vibrant player community and active developers**, KARDS consistently receives exciting new gameplay features and improvements. The game has seen numerous expansions, introducing new ally nations, hundreds of cards, and fresh game mechanics. The **World Championship**, held annually in Iceland, showcases the competitive spirit of the KARDS community.

### About 1939 Games

1939 Games is an **independent studio based in Iceland**, founded by veterans of CCP Games, renowned for their work on EVE Online. They aim to revolutionize the CCG market with KARDS, their unique and groundbreaking WWII CCG.

## GWENT: The Witcher Card Game - A Strategic Duel

GWENT: The Witcher Card Game offers a free-to-play experience centered on fast-paced, online Player-vs-Player (PvP) duels. This title masterfully blends Collectible Card Game (CCG) and Trading Card Game (TCG) elements, requiring players to master bluffing, real-time decision-making, and meticulous deck construction to achieve victory.

### Command Iconic Heroes and Powerful Spells

Assemble your forces with legendary characters such as Geralt and Yennefer, alongside other iconic heroes from The Witcher world. Expand your arsenal with a vast collection of spells and special abilities designed to dramatically shift the tide of battle. Employ deception and cunning strategies to emerge victorious in GWENT's diverse game modes, including classic, seasonal, and Arena challenges.

### A Fair and Rewarding Progression System

GWENT boasts a fair and enjoyable progression system, transforming the process of building a competitive card collection into a genuine pleasure. As noted by the developers, players can simply collect new cards as they play, allowing them to build decks without any hidden costs or restrictions.

### Visually Stunning and Engaging Gameplay

The game captivates with its beautiful, hand-drawn art and mesmerizing visual effects. These elements breathe life into every card, battle, and battlefield, making GWENT not only fun to play but also a joy to watch.

### Skill Over Luck: Strategic Depth

In GWENT, strategic thinking triumphs over chance. Whether you choose to overwhelm your opponent with brute force or outmaneuver them with clever tactics, the game's unique round-based gameplay provides a wealth of strategic possibilities. As highlighted in game descriptions, the core objective is to gather more points than your opponent in a round by playing cards across two distinct rows: melee and ranged. Winning two out of three rounds secures victory in the battle.

### Diverse Game Modes for Every Player

GWENT offers a variety of ways to play, catering to different preferences:

*   **Online Duels:** Engage in quick games against friends.
*   **PvP Challenges:** Test your skills in highly competitive matches.
*   **Arena Mode:** Embark on new and adventurous challenges.

### Accessible Yet Deeply Strategic

The gameplay is designed to be easily satisfying, yet far from simple. Players begin with 10 cards from their deck in hand, with the freedom to play any card from the outset. This allows for immediate strategic choices, such as deploying your strongest unit first or holding back key cards for later in the fight. The game encourages players to consider their deck composition and overall strategy carefully.

Card Hunter is a unique online collectible card game that masterfully combines card play, strategic deck building, tactical combat, and fantasy role-playing elements. This innovative blend offers an unparalleled gaming experience, inviting players into a world where their decisions on the tabletop directly influence their in-game actions.

The game's core mechanics revolve around building a party of adventurers and embarking on a grand quest within a massive single-player campaign. Each adventure serves as a test of both deck-building acumen and tactical foresight, pitting players against a variety of formidable foes. As you progress, you'll amass a diverse collection of fantastical equipment, including:

*   Swords
*   Shields
*   Other adventuring gear

A distinctive feature of Card Hunter is its innovative deck-building system. Instead of manually constructing your deck, the game automatically builds it for you based on the items you equip your party with. This creates a dynamic and engaging gameplay loop where strategic item selection is paramount.

Combat unfolds on a grid-based battlefield, demanding turn-based strategy. Success hinges on playing the right cards at the right time to overcome adversaries and earn valuable experience and loot.

Beyond the single-player experience, Card Hunter offers robust multiplayer options:

*   **Casual Games:** Engage in friendly matches to hone your skills.
*   **Ranked Matches:** Test your mettle against other players in competitive environments.
*   **Leagues:** Participate in regularly scheduled leagues, striving to reach the top of the monthly season.

The multiplayer aspect provides a continuous challenge, with opportunities to compete in events like the Graveyard Gambol league, where players can even command undead minions. For those who prefer a collaborative approach, Card Hunter supports cooperative play with one or two friends. Together, you can face the dangers of Cardhuntria and share in the rewards.

The game also features extensive additional content. Following the substantial core campaign, players can delve into the adventures of Omin, Binwin, and Jim from Acquisitions Incorporated, featuring an exclusive story penned by Jerry Holkins of Penny Arcade. Further expansions introduce new challenges and themes:

*   **Expedition to the Sky Citadel:** Prepare for an invasion of robots and advanced artificial intelligence.
*   **Attack of the Artifacts:** Confront prehistoric monsters and intelligent weapons from a bygone era.

Name: Etherlords II
Description:
The saga continues! Etherlords II takes you back to the world of Ether and into a whole new realm of fantastic possibilities. Lead your hero on an unforgettable journey through lands filled with unsurpassed beauty and danger to unlock the ultimate mystery. Etherlords II is an exciting mix of role-play and tactical turn-based combat in the best traditions of fantasy trading card games. This version of the game supports co-op battles via Internet, including Round Table mode: round robin elimination tournament with random set of cards. Key Features Five campaigns covering a magnificent fantasy world Hundreds of spells and creatures combine to create nearly unlimited tactical possibilities New monsters and magic that can be used by any of the four races Enhance your Hero’s skills throughout each campaign with new spells, creatures and abilities. Non-linear missions with multiple paths to completion Thorough tutorial system to help you learn basic and advanced dueling tactics 4 multiplayer modes. A dedicated master server that calculates and maintains your statistics and raitings

## Magic: The Gathering - Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013: A Deeper Dive

Prepare for an **elevated challenge** with Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013! This latest installment in the acclaimed franchise invites you to embark on an epic journey across **fantastical planes**, facing new encounters and formidable opponents. Whether you're playing solo against the AI or engaging with friends, the game offers a rich experience filled with **challenging puzzles** and the exciting Planechase multiplayer format, where you can battle up to three other players.

### Confronting the Ultimate Villain

After honing your strategic prowess, you'll have the opportunity to test your mettle against the **ultimate villain of the Multiverse**: the dragon Planeswalker, Nicol Bolas. This climactic confrontation serves as a true test of your mastery.

### Expanded Deck Customization and Gameplay Features

Magic 2013 boasts **ten distinct, customizable decks**, drawing from the latest Magic: The Gathering expansions. Notably, this includes your **first opportunity to play with cards from the Magic 2013 Core Set** before their official release. Beyond the initial deck builds, each set offers an additional 30 cards that can be **unlocked through gameplay**, providing ample opportunity for strategic refinement.

#### New Gameplay Mechanics for Strategic Depth

Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 introduces several key features designed to enhance gameplay:

*   **Individual Records:** Track your progress with **new gameplay statistics** to monitor your performance.
*   **Unlockable Game Items:** Discover and unlock a variety of **new game items** as you progress.
*   **Strategic Land Tapping:** For experienced players, the option to **choose which lands to tap** when casting spells offers a significant layer of strategic control.

### Bigger and Better: Enhanced Presentation and Modes

"Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 adds to the hit franchise with **updated graphics and music**, the latest cards and decks, and additional features, challenges, and an updated multiplayer game mode!" This commitment to improvement ensures a more immersive and engaging experience.

#### Multiplayer Mayhem: The Planechase Experience

Dive into the **Planechase multiplayer format**, where you and up to three other players (or AI opponents) will navigate the Multiverse. This mode features **strange phenomena** and an **ever-shifting environment**, making each battle a unique and unpredictable encounter, available in both local and online play.

#### Challenging Encounters: Master Unique Strategies

Experience **Encounters**, a unique puzzle-like mode in Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013. In these challenges, your opponent will wield a **stacked deck specifically designed to represent a particular Magic strategy**, forcing you to adapt and overcome diverse tactical approaches.

#### Play Your Way: Unparalleled Customization

The game empowers you to **play the way you want**. In addition to modifying your decks to suit your preferred playstyle, the ability to **choose which lands to tap** when casting spells provides an unprecedented level of control over your mana resources.

#### Built for All Experience Levels

With an **expanded tutorial** and deep gameplay mechanics, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 caters to **all Magic fans**. Whether you are "new to the game" or an "expert Planeswalker," you will find content that is both accessible and challenging. As one reviewer noted, "The game does an excellent job of onboarding new players while still offering enough depth for veterans."

Name: Magic: The Gathering - Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012
Description:
All-new and redesigned, Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 takes last year’s massive hit game to even greater heights with better graphics, more options, and new challenges! Face off against the AI, or gather your allies for the new multiplayer format: Archenemy, where you team up to take down a boss opponent. And if one of your fellow Planeswalkers drops out, no problem–the AI will drop in for uninterrupted action! Featuring ten unique decks, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 also lets you customize those decks. As you progress in the game, you can enhance your deck by swapping in new, unlockable cards! Gather your allies. A challenge awaits.

Name: Freespace 2
Description:
The year is 2367, thirty two years after the Great War. Or at least that is what YOU thought was the Great War. The endless line of Shivan capital ships, bombers and fighters with super advanced technology was nearly overwhelming. As the Terran and Vasudan races finish rebuilding their decimated societies, a disturbance lurks in the not-so-far reaches of the Gamma Draconis system. Your nemeses have arrived... and they are wondering what happened to their scouting party.

Name: EVE Online
Description:
THE #1 SPACE MMO EVE Online is the largest single shard space MMO of all time. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly 20 years of rich player-created history, join this storied universe and play free to experience everything from immense PvP or PvE battles to mining, exploration, and industry. Seize your destiny as an immortal, a Capsuleer capable of piloting over 350 fully customizable starships from small, nimble Frigates to formidable Battleships and massive Freighters. Embark on a solo adventure through the twisting nexus of wormhole space, form a mighty industrial empire to transform athe building blocks of the universe, or take up arms with likeminded players to conquer vast frontiers together. Who will you be in New Eden? PLAY FREE Experience this vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone with access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships of any faction. Enterprising Capsuleers may also choose to upgrade to Omega Clone for unlimited Ship access and double training speed. SINGLE SHARD, SINGLE SERVER SANDBOX As a single sharded MMO, all players of EVE Online play on the same server across all timezones. Jump in and join thousands of players in the greatest space sandbox there is. Every decision you make, battle you win, and system you claim becomes a part of the long, rich history of New Eden. Where will you leave your mark? GAMING'S BIGGEST BATTLES There's no limit on what you can accomplish as a Capsuleer. EVE currently holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle - 8,825 players in a single conflict. Take part in massive spaceship battles from day one or train up and command those fleets yourself. PLAYER DRIVEN ECONOMY EVE's player economy is one of unprecedented scale. The single shard nature of the universe makes for a single economy spread across thousands of space stations. Whether you want to trade on the local markets, produce new ships and equipment, or make cunning investments based on knowledge of player politics, it's all possible. LIMITLESS CHOICES Pursue a life of exploration, warfare, prosperity, or all of the above! Pilot over 350 different vessels and customize it to your liking with thousands of unique modules. Modify your ship as a fast and nimble fighter or design it from the ground up as a heavily shielded brawler to go toe to toe with others. Feeling lucky? Take a chance and modify your equipment further using alien technology found deep in Abyssal Deadspace. CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT With over 17 years of active development and free expansions, EVE is one of the longest running space MMOs out there. Join a thrilling universe filled with the unrelenting activity and combined history of millions of other players!

Name: Kerbal Space Program
Description:
In Kerbal Space Program , take charge of the space program for the alien race known as the Kerbals. You have access to an array of parts to assemble fully-functional spacecraft that flies (or doesn’t) based on realistic aerodynamic and orbital physics. Launch your Kerbal crew into orbit and beyond (while keeping them alive) to explore moons and planets in the Kerbol solar system, constructing bases and space stations to expand the reach of your expedition. Kerbal Space Program features three gameplay modes. In Science Mode, perform space experiments to unlock new technology and advance the knowledge of Kerbalkind. In Career Mode, oversee every aspect of the space program, including construction, strategy, funding, upgrades, and more. In Sandbox, you are free to build any spacecraft you can think of, with all parts and technology in the game. Key Features Build spaceships, rockets, and vehicles using any imaginable combination of parts, each with their own function that will affect the way your spacecraft behaves. Take full control over your ship’s setup to execute complex flight maneuvers. Manage your Kerbal crewmembers, including hiring, training, and sending them into space to become heroes. Discover a whole star system with unique moons and planets, exploring detailed terrain at a vast scale. Send your Kerbal crew outside their ships for “extra-vehicular” activities. Dock spacecraft together to construct space stations, massive starships, and surface bases on new planets. Use satellites to scan terrain and find biomes and other anomalies. Set up communications networks to communicate between your spacecraft and Kerbal Space Center. Research and develop new technologies to extract valuable information and resources from all over the solar system, and much more! Try out the many mods created by the Kerbal Space Program community!

Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity® is a unique "RT4X" game that masterfully blends the grand strategy of the 4X genre with the intense action of real-time strategy. In this expansive space opera, players assume the mantle of a civilization fighting for its very survival in a galaxy consumed by war. Your ultimate success hinges on your strategic prowess in managing your burgeoning empire and commanding formidable fleets of starships.

The game offers a truly epic experience, allowing you to:

*   **Explore a vast, dynamic 3D galaxy:** Traverse a universe filled with diverse celestial bodies, including planets, asteroids, plasma storms, and stars, each presenting unique challenges and opportunities.
*   **Master multiple roles with strategic zoom:** Seamlessly transition between the responsibilities of an emperor overseeing your empire and a fleet commander directing your forces in battle. This innovative feature allows you to zoom from a single fighter to your entire galactic dominion spanning billions of kilometers.
*   **Employ deep diplomatic and economic strategies:**
    *   Forge crucial alliances with other civilizations.
    *   Establish powerful pacts to unlock significant bonuses.
    *   Engage in interstellar trade to bolster your economy.
    *   Utilize mercenary pirates to neutralize overbearing rivals.
*   **Engage in colossal space battles:** Witness and participate in battles featuring hundreds of ships simultaneously, with up to 10,000 particles erupting in full-scale combat.
*   **Fortify your empire:** Defend your worlds by constructing imposing starbases, deploying devastating minefields, and researching cutting-edge defensive technologies.
*   **Leverage an advanced diplomacy system:** Create robust alliances and secure powerful pact bonuses. You can also bribe or hire pirates to eliminate opponents, but be warned: these mercenaries grow in strength and can eventually turn against you.

According to the game's design, Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity® emphasizes both the grand scale of empire building and the immediate tactical demands of real-time combat. The RT4X designation highlights this fusion, offering players a comprehensive and engaging galactic warfare experience. The game's features, such as the strategic zoom and the intricate diplomacy system, are designed to provide a rich and multifaceted gameplay loop. Research indicates that such genre-blending titles often appeal to a wide range of strategy enthusiasts.

Name: Independence War® 2: Edge of Chaos
Description:
The Badlands cluster. 100 years after the first Independence War. Your father was killed by the Corporations for a bad debt. And you've spent 15 years rotting in jail for trying to get justice. Now it's time for vengeance. Now it's time to turn back the Corporations before they corrupt the entire universe. Now it's time to take control of the universe's most advanced interstellar hardware and wage war in the greatest space-sim ever conceived. Command four futuristic battlecruisers and a band of revolutionary pirates into an all-consuming battle against impossible odds...because there just isn't enough Space for everyone! Innovative user-friendly interface - 90% of functions can be programmed where you like - on the joystick or on the keyboard or both! Online multiplayer support for up to 8 people. Play DeathMatch, Capture the Flag, and various other unique scenarios. The revolutionary Flux™ Graphics Engine: Microsoft Direct3D® compatible - surface effects like rust, decay and wear on the ships, and stunning fire and flare effects. All ships in the game are modeled using the textures and details from the ships created for the CGI movies. Physically realistic flight model. All ships use a Newtonian mechanics simulation and move according to the same rules as real spacecraft. This includes a simulation of both linear and angular momentum, inertia and rotational moment of inertia. Ships can use either a free-flight mode or use computer-assisted fly-by-wire flight controls. Team-up on the enemy with detachable fighters. Keep them on-board as murderous gun turrets or order them to attack as wingmen. Superior non-linear gameplay spanning 16 star systems, interacting with dynamically-created space traffic. Command 4 flyable ships and over 30 weapons and ship accessories that can be used in near-infinite combinations. Get to know the locals. Examples include taxicab ships, freighters, space patrols, and pirates. Watch the space opera unfold through a rich storyline in four acts. Important Note Regarding Multiplayer Gaming: Atari doesn't maintain active servers for this game anymore. However, multiplayer gaming on local networks is still possible. Important Note Regarding Compatibility: Please note, although successful testing was done on modern machines (Windows 7 and 8) to ensure compatibility, this is an older game and certain configurations may not work. Our testing has found, however, that with most machines if you run this game under Windows XP SP2 compatibility mode it works without issue.

Name: Universe Sandbox Legacy
Description:
/ Create and destroy on a scale you've never imagined with the ultimate space simulator. Harness the power to create black holes, collide galaxies, and manipulate gravity with just a few clicks. Inspired by the software astronomers use to unlock the mysteries of our universe, never before has astronomy been so interactive or so much fun. Spawn a massive moon to tear apart Saturn’s rings or launch a rogue star to rip the planets from their orbits around our sun. After unleashing catastrophic destruction, create your own solar system and share it with friends. Key Features Interactive, real-time, n-body gravity simulator Change any property of any object at any time Real physics, real data, real units, real science Compare the objects in any simulation with chart mode Supports anaglyphic 3D glasses and 3D DLP televisions Built in tutorials and step-by-step activities Includes 70+ simulations both real and fantastical Extensive editing and creation tools make it easy to build your own simulations

Name: Hardspace: Shipbreaker
Description:
Welcome to LYNX, the solar system’s leader in spaceship salvaging! We offer you the privilege of helping turn humanity’s past into its future by salvaging ships in zero-g. Each one is a puzzle, and how you solve it is up to you! Carve your way in, salvage everything, and maximize your profit. Our cutting-edge LYNX tech helps you do the job. Slice metal with the laser cutter and use the grapple tool to move salvage with ease. Earn upgrades, such as demo charges, sensors, and safety gear. Careful where you point those tools! Hazards include explosive decompression, fuel, electricity, and radiation. Your life is protected by our EverWork™ technology, but our profits aren’t. Your LYNX adventure starts now! Account balance owing is: 1,252,594,441.92 Credits Start paying that debt! Good luck, shipbreaker! Experience daily life as a blue-collar spaceship salvager Cut and destroy at will in a next-gen physics sim Salvage through a compelling campaign, relax in freeplay, or compete in timed challenges Explore a variety of ship types with unlimited variations Upgrade tools and gear to take on bigger and harder ships

Name: Sins of a Solar Empire®: Rebellion
Description:
The Next Installment to the Award-Winning RTS. While many were hopeful that diplomacy would finally end the war, differing opinions on what should be done, along with the depleted power of the controlling factions, has led to a splintering of the groups involved. The loyalist members of the Trader Emergency Coalition adopt a policy of isolation, focusing on enhanced defenses to ride out the rest of the war. Those who rebel against the coalition take on a purely militant view, coming to the opinion that the only way to bring peace is by ultimately crushing all who oppose them - especially xenos. For the first time in their history, the war creates a schism in the Advent Unity. The loyalists seek to continue their policy of revenge against the Traders, and to assimilate all others to the Unity’s influence. However, others amongst the Advent suspect that a corrupting influence from within has diverted the Unity from its proper destiny. The divide created in the Vasari Empire is less pronounced, but just as severe to their people. With the Vasari now practically frantic to move on to new space, the loyalist faction abandons cooperation and decides to take the resources they need by any means necessary. Having accepted the need to work together, the rebel faction feels that their best chance for survival is to work with the other races and bring them along to flee the approaching enemy. Take the battle for galactic supremacy to its ultimate level in Sins of a Solar Empire: Rebellion – a standalone RT4X game that combines the tactics of real-time strategy with the depth of the 4X genre (eXplore, eXpand, eXploit, eXterminate). Key features: New Factions : Decide whether to play as a Loyalist or Rebel – each unlocks new technologies, ships and play styles for each race. New Titan Class Warships : Mighty titans enter the fray of the war to tip the scales of power. Each faction may field their own unique titan, drawing upon unique strengths and abilities on the battlefield. New and Updated Capital Ships : A new capital ship joins the fleet for each race to offer even more tactical options. Additionally, all existing capital ships have been upgraded to four levels for their abilities, allowing players to focus their ships along specific strengths. New Corvette Class Ships : Small and maneuverable, each faction has developed a new light attack craft to harass enemy forces. Updated Visuals : Updated graphics, particle effects, lighting and shadows, race specific UI and other enhancements make the Sins’ universe look better than ever. New Victory Conditions : Take multiple paths to victory including – Military, Diplomatic, Research, Last Flagship Standing, Last Capital Standing and Occupation. New Audio : More than 60 minutes of original music, countless new sound effects and dozens of new voice overs help bring the drama of battle to new levels of immersion. Tutorials : New and updated tutorials make it easy for both experienced and new players to quickly start building their own solar empire. Plus, a number of optimizations that provide better performance than ever before!

Name: Elite Dangerous
Description:
Elite Dangerous is the definitive massively multiplayer space epic, bringing gaming’s original open world adventure to the modern generation with a connected galaxy, evolving narrative and the entirety of the Milky Way re-created at its full galactic proportions. Starting with only a small starship and a few credits, players do whatever it takes to earn the skill, knowledge, wealth and power to survive in a futuristic cutthroat galaxy and to stand among the ranks of the iconic Elite. In an age of galactic superpowers and interstellar war, every player’s story influences the unique connected gaming experience and handcrafted evolving narrative. Governments fall, battles are lost and won, and humanity’s frontier is reshaped, all by players’ actions. Horizons Season Now Included! Experience a whole new angle on the galaxy with the Horizons season, now included in Elite Dangerous . Journey from the stars to the surfaces of strange worlds, hit the ground running in the Scarab Surface Recon Vehicle, craft weapons, deploy ship-launched fighters and experience exhilarating multicrew co-op action. A Galaxy Of Wonders The 400 billion star systems of the Milky Way are the stage for Elite Dangerous ' open-ended gameplay. The real stars, planets, moons, asteroid fields and black holes of our own galaxy are built to their true epic proportions in the largest designed playspace in videogame history. A Unique Connected Game Experience Governments fall, battles are lost and won, and humanity’s frontier is reshaped, all by players’ actions. In an age of galactic superpowers and interstellar war, every player’s personal story influences the connected galaxy and handcrafted, evolving narrative. Blaze Your Own Trail Upgrade your ship and customize every component as you hunt, explore, fight, mine, smuggle, trade and survive in the cutthroat galaxy of the year 3301. Do whatever it takes to earn the skill, knowledge, wealth and power to stand among the ranks of the Elite. Massively Multiplayer Experience unpredictable encounters with players from around the world in Elite Dangerous ’ vast, massively multiplayer space. Experience the connected galaxy alone in Solo mode or with players across the world in Open Play, where every pilot you face could become a trusted ally or your deadliest enemy. You will need to register a free Elite Dangerous account with Frontier to play the game. A Living Game Elite Dangerous grows and expands with new features and content. Major updates react to the way players want to play and create new gameplay opportunities for the hundreds of thousands of players cooperating, competing and exploring together in the connected galaxy. The Original Open World Adventure Elite Dangerous is the third sequel to 1984's genre-defining Elite, bringing gaming’s original open world adventure into the modern generation with a connected galaxy, evolving narrative and the entire Milky Way recreated at its full galactic proportions.

## Become a Starfighter Ace in STAR WARS™: Squadrons

Experience the ultimate authentic piloting adventure in STAR WARS™: Squadrons. Prepare for adrenaline-pumping, first-person space dogfights as you join your squadron in thrilling multiplayer battles. Enlist as a pilot and take command of iconic starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial fleets, engaging in strategic 5v5 combat. This immersive experience puts you directly into the cockpit, ready to defend the galaxy.

### Customize Your Flight and Conquer

Tailor your starfighter with a variety of modifications and adjust your squadron's composition to match your playstyle. Triumph as a team by completing tactical objectives on diverse battlefields, including the gas giant of Yavin Prime and the shattered moon of Galitan. Master legendary starfighters like the X-wing and TIE fighter, customizing their loadouts and cosmetics to reflect your personal flair.

### Immerse Yourself in the Cockpit

Divert power between weapons, shields, and engines to gain a tactical edge. The cockpit is your domain, offering an intense first-person perspective with only a thin hull separating you from the perils of space. This **intimate view** is crucial for survival and strategic decision-making.

### A Galaxy-Spanning Story and Intense Multiplayer

STAR WARS™: Squadrons offers a comprehensive experience, blending a compelling narrative with exhilarating multiplayer action.

#### Single-Player Campaign: Uncover Your Role

Uncover the meaning of being a pilot in the aftermath of *Return of the Jedi*. Experience the conflict from alternating perspectives of both the New Republic and the Empire as iconic and emerging leaders battle for galactic control. The New Republic champions freedom, while the Empire enforces order. Your skills are needed to join the galaxy's finest. This campaign allows players to **understand the stakes** of the ongoing galactic struggle.

#### Multiplayer Dogfights: Strategic Teamwork

Plan your skirmishes in the briefing room before deploying to evolving battlefields. Compete in intense 5v5 multiplayer dogfights or unite with your squadron to influence monumental fleet battles. Success hinges on **effective communication and coordination**.

### Master Legendary Starfighters

Command various classes of starfighters, from the agile A-wing to the devastating TIE bomber. Modify your ship, manage its power systems, and outmaneuver your opponents in strategic space combat. Each ship offers a **unique tactical advantage**.

### Earn Rewards Through Play

STAR WARS™: Squadrons offers a complete, self-contained experience from launch. Progress through the ranks and unlock new components, including weapons, hulls, engines, shields, and cosmetic items, ensuring a **fresh and engaging gameplay loop**.

### Experience It All in VR

For the ultimate immersion, players have the option to play the entirety of STAR WARS™: Squadrons in virtual reality (VR), truly living out their STAR WARS pilot fantasy. This feature provides an **unparalleled sense of presence**.

Opus Magnum is an open-ended puzzle game from Zachtronics, the acclaimed developers behind SpaceChem, Infinifactory, TIS-100, and SHENZHEN I/O. This game places players in the role of an alchemist, a profession vital to the very existence of civilization. As the narrative unfolds, players are introduced to Anataeus Vaya, a highly regarded alchemist who has just accepted a prestigious position as Head Alchemist of House Van Tassen. This ancient and affluent family, however, harbors hidden dangers beneath its lavish exterior, suggesting that alchemical prowess alone might not be sufficient to navigate the impending challenges.

In Opus Magnum, players are tasked with mastering the complex and physical mechanisms of the transmutation engine, the pinnacle of alchemical engineering tools. This engine allows for the creation of a wide array of essential items, including:

*   **Vital remedies:** Crucial for healing and well-being.
*   **Precious gemstones:** Highly valued for their beauty and rarity.
*   **Deadly weapons:** Instruments of conflict and defense.
*   **And more:** The possibilities extend to numerous other alchemical creations.

The core gameplay revolves around designing and constructing intricate machines capable of executing alchemical processes. Players have access to a diverse set of components to achieve this, such as:

*   **Programmable arms:** For precise manipulation of materials.
*   **Customizable tracks:** To guide the movement of components.
*   **Esoteric devices:** Including unique elements like Van Berlo’s wheel and the Glyph of Animismus, which introduce specialized alchemical functions.

Opus Magnum champions an open-ended approach to puzzle-solving. Players are encouraged to compete with others globally to devise the most elegant, efficient, and compact solutions to the game's various challenges. The game also allows players to export animated GIFs of their ingenious machine designs, providing a platform to showcase their creativity.

Further enhancing the game's replayability and community engagement is its robust Steam Workshop integration. This feature enables players to:

*   **Create and share their own puzzles:** Utilizing an intuitive puzzle editor.
*   **Play top user-submitted puzzles:** These are featured in the esteemed Journal of Alchemical Engineering, curated by Zachtronics itself.

The game also boasts a rich narrative filled with intrigue and clandestine plots that ensnare the city's ancient Houses. Alchemists, possessing the extraordinary ability to fabricate nearly anything conceivable within the realm of science, are in high demand, making them both sought-after and potentially dangerous individuals.

To provide a respite from the intense focus required for alchemical engineering, Opus Magnum includes a charming solitaire minigame called Sigmar’s Garden. This original alchemy-themed card game offers a break, with every game being winnable, though success is not guaranteed.

Name: Factorio
Description:
Factorio is a game in which you build and maintain factories. You will be mining resources, researching technologies, building infrastructure, automating production and fighting enemies. In the beginning you will find yourself chopping trees, mining ores and crafting mechanical arms and transport belts by hand, but in short time you can become an industrial powerhouse, with huge solar fields, oil refining and cracking, manufacture and deployment of construction and logistic robots, all for your resource needs. However this heavy exploitation of the planet's resources does not sit nicely with the locals, so you will have to be prepared to defend yourself and your machine empire. Join forces with other players in cooperative Multiplayer , create huge factories, collaborate and delegate tasks between you and your friends. Add mods to increase your enjoyment, from small tweak and helper mods to complete game overhauls, Factorio's ground-up Modding support has allowed content creators from around the world to design interesting and innovative features. While the core gameplay is in the form of the freeplay scenario, there are a range of interesting challenges in the form of Scenarios . If you don't find any maps or scenarios you enjoy, you can create your own with the in-game Map Editor , place down entities, enemies, and terrain in any way you like, and even add your own custom script to make for interesting gameplay. Discount Disclaimer: We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future. What people say about Factorio No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly. - Reddit I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately. - Notch, Mojang Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens. - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: SpaceChem
Description:
Zachtronics is back with an ambitious new design-based puzzle game. Take on the role of a Reactor Engineer working for SpaceChem , the leading chemical synthesizer for frontier colonies. Construct elaborate factories to transform raw materials into valuable chemical products! Streamline your designs to meet production quotas and survive encounters with the sinister threats that plague SpaceChem . KEY FEATURES: Over Fifty Mind-bending Puzzles! An original soundtrack by Evan Le Ny, whose music was featured in The Codex of Alchemical Engineering! Twenty challenging achievements!

Name: Autonauts
Description:
Travel the universe colonising uninhabited planets with the sole goal of setting worlds in motion through the power of automation. Fresh from your spaceship you must harvest stick and stone and begin your colonisation efforts. Create rudimentary crafting items from blueprints and slowly build a number of workerbots to aid in your efforts. Teach and shape their artificial intelligence with a visual programming language, then instruct them to begin the formation of your colony. Marvel as a planet you’ve shaped becomes home to a civilisation of workerbots, happy to do your bidding! Expand further with the creation of colonists; beings that require your assistance to survive. Push your workerbots further by introducing fishing, cooking, housing, and tailoring and help the colonists into a state of transcendence. Key Features: Playful Programming Teach your workerbots requisite steps to complete tasks by asking them to repeat actions utilising a visual programming language. Designed to be easy to learn but with added complexity there are numerous possibilities. Automated Automation Build an army of bots to automate just about everything in your colony, teach them what to do and expand both their brains and task possibilities with numerous upgrades and options. Various Ventures From gathering to building, cooking, fishing, tailoring, farming, animal husbandry and more - the world of Autonauts is vast with limitless opportunities to automate and colonise. Charming Creativity The world of Autonauts pops to life with a low-poly art-style married with a consistent and bright colour palette adding depth and scale, creating a relaxing and attractive play space. Autonauts combines the very best of agriculture, simulation, crafting, building, production-line and resource management titles to create a brand new experience unlike any other. Create the automated world of your dreams! The future is now!

Name: Per Aspera
Description:
The surface of Mars is littered with Humanity’s failed attempts to colonize its surface. This time will be different - this time there is no room for human error. Per Aspera is a planetary simulation game that combines hard science fiction and base building and takes the experience planet-wide. Step into the role of AMI, an Artificial Consciousness with the prime directive of terraforming Mars for human colonization. FEATURES: Balance a complex well of resources to build interconnected structures that span the entire planet. Customize your planet with branching research trees that allow players to tailor their terraforming plan — Develop new technologies, steeped in real-world science, to create a thriving interplanetary civilization. Uncover the mystery of a threatening presence on Mars and defend your colonies from unknown and combative forces. Immerse yourself in a rich, compelling narrative or take your time and craft the perfect Martian landscape with Sandbox Mode. Includes the immersive voice acting talents of Troy Baker, Phil LaMarr, Laila Berzins, Yong Yea, Lynsey Murrell, and Nneka Okoye. Terraform Together with Friends (up to 4 players). Sandbox Mode Only. Using scientific theories proposed by real space agencies and geographical data directly from NASA, Per Aspera presents life-like conditions and challenges steeped in theoretical science. Per Aspera contains a rich narrative that presents players with difficult decisions with planet-wide consequences. See the world through the eyes of an infant AI as it traverses a complicated ocean of self-discovery and shapes the fate of the human race. Navigate your ever-evolving programming to adapt to morally challenging concepts and forge relationships with the human colonists that look to you for their continued survival. The choices you make will impact how your mission ultimately concludes. Keep your wits about you as this is not the first time humans have tried to tame the Red Planet. Expose long-forgotten relics of Humanity’s failed attempts, learn from their past mistakes, and uncover a looming menace that threatens to see you fail at any cost.

Name: Drill Down
Description:
You start out on the surface on a mine shaft, faced with several deposits of valuable ores. You begin building your basic mining rig, harvesting the resources and transporting them via conveyor belts to your storage center. You gather more resources, invest into research & development, discover new techniques and machinery. Your factory grows, your processing chains grow longer, you need to expand. So you dig down deeper into the earth, discovering new materials and opportunities. All the while your factory must stay humming and busy, so you swap back and forth, adjusting conveyor paths and bottlenecks in the system. Refine and improve your materials and products further and further, to eventually be able to use highly advanced tech to create the pinnacle of engineering, a computer chip. Features: - Procedurally generated world - 100 different machines - 100 resources and products - play-time to your first chip: about 30 hours - play-time to you feeling there is nothing left to tweak and you can go outside now: infinity

Name: RAILGRADE
Description:
Construct intricate railway networks and use the power of trains to connect vital industries with the resources they require. Manage inputs and outputs to optimise production, and create efficient supply chains using multi-level tracks and a variety of unique engine types. • Customise your trains using different engines and freight types, with hundreds of unique engine and cargo combinations. • Create efficient supply chains by connecting industrial sources and placing dozens of busy trains on the map. Combine strategic decision-making with creative construction in order to rebuild a thriving industrial colony. Succeed, and you might just impress your corporate overlords enough to be allowed back home to earth. • Help restore prosperity to an industrial colony across a single player campaign with over 50 missions. • Spend tokens awarded by each mission and use them to unlock new industries, upgrades and options. • Use effortless construction tools to instantly build and manage a busy railway network packed by trains. • Optimise your train set-up and place tracks strategically to navigate challenging environmental terrain and create the most effective delivery route possible. • Control the flow of resource production through careful management of inputs and outputs. Watch out for bottlenecks to keep trains and their precious cargo moving. • Admire your fleet of trains with the cinematic view mode. • Challenge yourself in bonus side missions. Explore arid deserts in search of oil supplies, or develop a rocket launch program. • Show off your most impressive railway setups with a photo mode that includes a variety of filters and visual options. • Invest in the growth of your cities, or use zeppelins to export goods for extra profit.

Name: Human Resource Machine
Description:
Update: now includes the official soundtrack Program little office workers to solve puzzles. Be a good employee! The machines are coming... for your job. Human Resource Machine is a puzzle game for nerds. In each level, your boss gives you a job. Automate it by programming your little office worker. If you succeed, you'll be promoted up to the next level for another year of work in the vast office building. Congratulations! Don't worry if you've never programmed before - programming is just puzzle solving . If you strip away all the 1's and 0's and scary squiggly brackets, programming is actually really simple, logical, beautiful, and something that anyone can understand and have fun with! Are you already an expert? There will be extra challenges for you. From the creators of World of Goo and Little Inferno . Have fun! Management is watching.

## Become a Factory Tycoon in Little Big Workshop

Step into the role of a factory tycoon in **Little Big Workshop**, a charming and engaging simulation game that transforms your living room into a magical, miniature manufacturing hub. This game offers a unique blend of strategic planning and hands-on management, allowing you to build and expand your very own tabletop factory.

### Designing and Producing a Wide Array of Goods

In Little Big Workshop, your primary goal is to fulfill customer orders by producing a vast array of goods. From simple rubber ducks and dressers to complex drones and electric guitars, the possibilities are extensive. You'll manage the entire production process, from sourcing various materials to assembling intricate products.

*   **Product Variety:** Create over 50 unique product types, each built from multiple parts and pieces.
*   **Material Flexibility:** Utilize different materials and production methods to craft your items.
*   **Market Dynamics:** Supply products to clients and adapt to an ever-changing market.

### Managing and Expanding Your Factory

As the "Big Boss," you'll be responsible for organizing the factory floor, managing your diligent workers, and purchasing essential machinery. The game emphasizes practical problem-solving, focusing on the mechanics of production rather than complex economic simulations.

*   **Production Lines:** Design and implement efficient production lines to maximize output.
*   **Blueprint Planning:** Organize all steps of the production process on a detailed blueprint.
*   **Factory Growth:** Your factory will expand as you unlock more desk space, allowing for larger operations.

### Embracing the Sandbox Experience

Little Big Workshop provides an open-ended sandbox experience, encouraging players to experiment and refine their strategies. The game features a fully simulated Day/Night cycle, adding another layer of immersion.

*   **Worker Care:** Pay attention to your workers' well-being; overworking them can lead to exhaustion.
*   **Art Style:** Enjoy a charming model-town art style that brings your miniature factory to life.
*   **Razer Chroma Support:** Experience enhanced immersion with Razer Chroma integration.

According to game developers, the focus is on the practical challenges of manufacturing, making it an accessible yet deep simulation. The game's design encourages creativity, ensuring that no two factories will ever look the same. As you progress, you'll unlock fancier machines and more production methods, transforming your small workshop into a bustling, desk-filling enterprise. Soon, you'll be running multiple production lines, churning out hundreds of advanced products daily, and watching with satisfaction as your cute workers diligently bring your designs to life.

## Big Pharma: Navigating the Business of Healing and Profit

In **Big Pharma**, players assume the role of a Pharmaceutical Conglomerate leader, tasked with the immense power to develop treatments that can eradicate diseases, improve lives, and alleviate suffering. The core dilemma presented is whether to prioritize altruism or acknowledge the reality that **some remedies are more profitable than others, and illness can, in fact, be good for business**. This game delves into the complex and compelling world of the pharmaceutical industry.

### From Humble Beginnings to Global Impact

The game begins with modest resources, allowing players to progress from manufacturing affordable generic treatments for common ailments to the groundbreaking discovery of new active ingredients. This evolution involves acquiring advanced machinery to refine the next generation of **world-changing drugs**. However, the path to pharmaceutical dominance is fraught with competition, as rival corporations actively develop their own competing cures and treatments. Furthermore, the marketplace is a **dynamically shifting landscape**, where demand for products can fluctuate significantly based on seasonal factors.

### The Intersection of Science and Business Acumen

**Big Pharma** masterfully blends elements of a business simulation with a challenging logistics puzzle. The act of perfecting new formulas in the lab is only the first step. The true challenge lies in **converting scientific innovation into tangible financial success**, demanding both an engineering and a sharp business mind. Factory space is a significant expense, and the integration of sophisticated equipment requires careful planning and execution. As one industry observer noted, "The real innovation in pharmaceuticals isn't just in the lab; it's in the supply chain and market strategy."

### Key Features of Big Pharma:

*   **Extensive Challenges:** Engage in **35 business-busting challenges** meticulously designed across **7 unique scenarios**, each presenting distinct strategic hurdles.
*   **Customization:** Tailor your experience with a **custom game mode**, allowing for personalized gameplay.
*   **Creative Freedom:** Unleash your entrepreneurial spirit in **freebuild mode**, where you can experiment without predefined objectives.
*   **Community Driven Content:** Enhance your gameplay with extensive **modding support**, enabling access to a wealth of community-created content and modifications.

This game offers a unique opportunity to explore the intricate balance between **ethical considerations and the pursuit of profit** within the vital pharmaceutical industry.

## Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Your Gateway to WWII Real-Time Strategy

The **Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition** provides access to the **latest updated version of Company of Heroes (COH1)**, now simply titled 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. For the best online experience and to connect with the active community, it is **highly recommended to use this updated version**. You can find additional resources and join the COH1 Steam Community & Modding scene through these links: [COH1 Community Hub](link-to-community-hub) and [COH1 Steam Workshop](link-to-steam-workshop).

### Experience the Visceral Reality of World War II

Company of Heroes revolutionized the real-time strategy genre by delivering an **unparalleled WWII gaming experience**. It vividly portrays:

*   The **sacrifice of heroic soldiers**
*   The **devastation of war-torn environments**
*   The **dynamic nature of evolving battlefields**

Players are thrust into the heart of pivotal WWII battles, commencing with the iconic **D-Day Invasion of Normandy**. Here, you will command Allied squads against the formidable German war machine.

### A Cinematic Single-Player Campaign

Immerse yourself in a **rich single-player campaign** that captures the **cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers** facing extraordinary circumstances. This experience is crafted to depict the turmoil of WWII with remarkable depth. The game features **advanced squad AI**, bringing your soldiers to life. They dynamically interact with their surroundings, seek cover, and employ sophisticated tactics to overcome enemy forces.

### Unprecedented Visuals and Environmental Strategy

Powered by Relic's cutting-edge engine, Company of Heroes features **stunning visuals** and a **physics-driven world** that was groundbreaking for its time in the RTS genre. **Environmental strategy** is a crucial gameplay element. **Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment** ensure that no two battles play out identically. Players can **destroy anything and reshape the battlefield** to their strategic advantage. Utilize buildings and terrain for cover and tactical superiority, or deny these vital assets to your opponent.

### Engage in Multiplayer Competition

For those seeking a competitive challenge, Company of Heroes offers **2-8 player multiplayer matches** via LAN or Internet. **Go online with friends and join the ultimate Axis versus Allies battle**, testing your strategic skills against other players in intense, real-time engagements.

Name: Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts
Description:
The next chapter in the #1 rated RTS franchise thrusts players into a hellish war torn landscape to command two battle-hardened armies in relentless campaigns for honor and country. Players lead the tenacious British 2nd Army during the heroic World War II liberation of Caen, France, and command the German Panzer Elite as they struggle to repel the largest airborne invasion in history. Two New Armies: Play as the British 2nd Army or German Panzer Elite, each with devastating command trees options and unit upgrades. Two Full Campaigns: Command the British 2nd Army to liberate the key strategic position of Caen, France. Control the German Panzer Elite to repel the Allied airborne invasion in Operation Market Garden. Real War, Real Battlefields, Real War Enhanced: Mission Persistence, Dynamic Weather Effects, Enhanced Vehicle Tactics and more deliver a new level of realism and all new battlefield tactics. All new Multiplayer Options: Combine Company of Heroes™: Opposing Fronts™ with the original Company of Heroes for a total of four playable armies online. Join British artillery with American armor to dominate the 3rd Reich or utilize Wehrmacht and Panzer Elite blitzkrieg tactics to annihilate the Allied invasion. DirectX® 10 Support provides the most realistic RTS experience available with enhanced lighting and incredible terrain detail.

Name: Fuga: Melodies of Steel
Description:
'We have to fight! If we don't, everyone we love will be taken away!' One fateful night, a peaceful village is thrown into the flames of war. Determined to save their families, a group of children boards a giant tank and begins an offensive charge! Fuga: Melodies of Steel is an RPG where you place children, each with their own unique characteristics and skills, at different gun turrets in a tank to fight against the enemy. Living inside the tank, the children show emotion and gain affinity amongst each other. Manage these both to change the outcome of their journey! -A mysterious ancient weapon: The Taranis Taranis, the giant tank sheltering the children, conceals many mysteries and somehow seems to have its own will. In situations of crisis, it can release a forbidden weapon, the dreadful Soul Cannon. -Your adventure. Your choices. Will you make sacrifices for victory? Or will you seek another path? In this RPG, many choices have to be made in order to progress... but taking the safest road may not always be the best option. Faced with a desperate situation, what course of action will you choose?

Call of Duty: World at War plunges players into the most intense and chaotic World War II combat ever experienced. This installment builds upon the acclaimed Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare engine to deliver a gritty, uncensored war experience. Players will fight alongside allies through harrowing battles on both the European and Pacific fronts, contributing to the eventual downfall of the Axis powers.

The game introduces a variety of unique enemies and combat tactics, including:

*   **Kamikaze fighters:** Fearless aerial assaults.
*   **Ambush attacks:** Enemies emerging from unexpected locations.
*   **Banzai charges:** All-out, often suicidal, offensive maneuvers.
*   **Cunning cover tactics:** Enemies utilizing the environment for strategic advantage.

**Key Features:**

*   **Co-Op Campaign Mode:** For the first time in the franchise, experience the campaign with up to four players online. This mode enhances camaraderie and tactical execution, offering deeper replayability with challenges, rankings, and online stats. Competitive Co-Op also allows players to test their skills against teammates.
*   **Enhanced Multiplayer:** The addictive class-based multiplayer returns, now featuring vehicle combat with tanks. Persistent stats, player rankings, weapon upgrades, squad-based gameplay, customizable classes, and Perks are all enhanced to set a new standard for online warfare.
*   **Unprecedented Visuals:** Utilizing the Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare engine, World at War boasts cutting-edge technology. This includes highly-detailed character models, advanced lighting, and stunning special effects. Features like depth of field, rim-lighting, and realistic fire propagation create a truly immersive and dynamic combat environment.

Players will step into the boots of a U.S. Marine and a Russian conscript, battling elite German soldiers and the Imperial Japanese forces across diverse Pacific and European landscapes. Missions involve intense infantry, vehicle, and airborne combat.

Valkyria Chronicles 4 Complete Edition immerses players in a continent ravaged by war, offering an all-new narrative within the same timeframe as the original game. This installment focuses on Squad E of the Federation, led by Commander Claude Wallace and his childhood friends. Their desperate fight for victory is fraught with peril, including brutal blizzards, relentless imperial soldiers, and the formidable power of the Valkyria. The game proudly features the return of the acclaimed BLiTZ Battle System and the distinctive CANVAS Graphic Engine.

**Key Features:**

*   **A Coming-of-Age Story in a Time of War:** Command a cast of determined young characters, including Commander Claude Wallace, engineer Riley Miller, the fiery Raz, and the precise sniper Kai Schulen. Experience the harsh realities of war and witness if the bonds of Squad E can endure the frozen battlefield.
*   **The Next Generation "BLiTZ" Battle System:** This unique system blends overhead turn-based strategy, RPG elements, and real-time third-person shooting. New additions include:
    *   The explosive Grenadier class.
    *   Extensive offensive and defensive battleship support options.
    *   "Last Stand" actions for units before defeat.
    *   Larger maps and more units to confront the imperial threat.
*   **CANVAS Aesthetics:** The series' signature hand-drawn visual style is revitalized for the latest generation. The CANVAS Graphics Engine, inspired by watercolor art, merges reality and imagination to create a vibrant world brimming with emotion, presenting Squad E's journey as an interactive painting.
*   **The Return of a Legendary Composer:** Hitoshi Sakimoto, the original composer for the Valkyria Chronicles series, returns to deliver a sweeping orchestral score.
