*   **Epic Adventure and Side Missions:** Engage in a sprawling narrative by fighting for two opposing factions, relentlessly pursuing your ultimate objective. Undertake over 70 optional side missions to acquire crucial intelligence, powerful new weaponry, and essential vehicles.
*   **Dynamic, Non-Scripted AI:** Encounter intelligent enemies whose actions are not predetermined. Medics will bravely rescue wounded comrades, and common soldiers will develop a palpable fear of your presence. Your in-game reputation and actions can directly influence enemy behavior, leading them to surrender or flee in terror. Prepare for unpredictable encounters where enemy reactions are never certain.
*   **Intense Multiplayer:** Test your skills against friends in a competitive multiplayer arena, but remain vigilant. Trust is a luxury you may not be able to afford, as alliances can shift and betrayal is always a possibility. All the cutting-edge technical features from the single-player campaign are seamlessly integrated into the multiplayer experience.

Name: Aliens Go Home Run
Description:
A combination of Breakout, Shoot Em Up, and Baseball, Aliens Go Home Run puts you in the shoes of Sally, a young girl with a passion for baseball. When she hits a home run so hard, the ball flies into space and crashes into a faraway planet belonging to an alien race, creating a crater in the process. Now, the aliens are taking revenge on Earth, and its up to Sally to save the day! Features include: 70 levels of Brick-Breaking Action! 9 Intense Boss Fights Several different power-ups and enemy types Awesome chiptune soundtrack by +TEK Online leaderboards to compare your level scores against the world! A robust Level Editor with Steam Workshop support

## Field of Glory II: A Tactical Wargame Renaissance

Field of Glory II, developed by Richard Bodley Scott, revitalizes the tabletop wargaming experience with a new 3D engine, aiming to set new standards in computer wargaming. This turn-based tactical game transports players to the tumultuous era of Rome's rise, from 280 BC to 25 BC.

### Engage in Diverse Battles

The game offers unparalleled flexibility, allowing players to:

*   Fight for or against Rome, experiencing pivotal conflicts involving the burgeoning Roman Republic.
*   Engage other ancient nations, pitting your forces against civilizations unaware of Rome's eventual dominance.
*   Explore "what-if" scenarios by creating alternate histories where nations clash that never historically did.

### Command a Vast Array of Armies

Field of Glory II features a huge variety of armies, each with distinct tactical doctrines. Lead your chosen army and its named generals to victory in:

*   Set-piece historical battles, recreating famous engagements from antiquity.
*   Custom battle situations, where you design your own scenarios against AI or human opponents.

Victory demands determination and tactical mastery.

### Key Features for Authentic Warfare

*   **Accurate Historical Simulation:** The game meticulously simulates ancient battles from the last three centuries of the pre-Christian era.
*   **Extensive Unit Roster:** Over 86 historically accurate units, rendered with fully animated 3D troop models and numerous variants, represent the full spectrum of troop types and tactical doctrines of the period. This includes Roman legionaries, Greek hoplites, Carthaginian African spearmen, Hellenistic pike phalanxes, Gallic warbands, Skythian horse archers, Sarmatian lancers, various cavalry types, war elephants, Celtic and Indian chariots, and a wealth of light troops.
*   **Historical Scenarios:** Twelve epic scenarios cover key engagements such as Bagradas (255 BC), Trebia (218 BC), Cannae (216 BC), Ilipa (206 BC), Zama (202 BC), Magnesia (190 BC), Pydna (168 BC), Chaironeia (86 BC), Tigranocerta (69 BC), Bibracte (58 BC), Carrhae (53 BC), and Thapsus (46 BC). Players can command either side in these battles.
*   **Custom Battle System:** Design unlimited "what-if" scenarios using historically realistic armies drawn from carefully researched army lists, played out on realistic, computer-generated terrain maps. Armies include Romans, Carthaginians, Hellenistic Kingdoms, Gauls, Ancient Britons, Galatians, Spanish, Numidians, Spartacus’s Slave Revolt, Thracians, Skythians, Sarmatians, Parthians, and Indians, among others.
*   **Campaign Mode:** Rewrite history by guiding ancient generals through their battlefield careers or wage war with any ancient nation against any other. Victories enhance the experience and elan of your core units.
*   **Streamlined Gameplay:** Quick strategic decisions allow for seamless transitions between battles.
*   **Random Map Generator:** An infinite variety of historically realistic battlefield maps are available for custom battles and campaigns.
*   **Diverse Scenario Objectives:** Scenarios include open battle, pursuit, awaiting reinforcements, enemy awaiting reinforcements, flank march, rearguard action, advance guard, remove the head, and protect the baggage.
*   **Classic Turn-Based Gameplay:** Experience tile-based gameplay with an easy-to-use interface and challenging mastery.
*   **Cohort-Sized Units:** Battles can range from a few units to as many as 80 units per side.
*   **Named Generals:** These influential figures can impact the combat and morale of units under their command.
*   **Single and Multiplayer Modes:** Engage in battles against AI or human opponents.
*   **Effective AI:** The artificial intelligence makes sound tactical decisions.
*   **Adjustable Difficulty:** Six difficulty levels cater to players of all skill levels.
*   **Modding Support:** A mod-friendly game system includes a built-in map editor.
*   **Multiplayer Functionality:** The Slitherine PBEM server facilitates easy online play for both historical and "what-if" scenarios.

Name: Act of War: Direct Action
Description:
Tomorrow's War Is NOW Ripped from today's headlines, Act of War: Direct Action™ is a frightening tale of suspense, international intrigue and geopolitical military conflict. This real-time strategy experience puts you squarely in control of counterterrorist forces and delivers a first look at tomorrow's war. The Situation: A crippling energy crisis. Terrorist attacks. Massive strikes. Global instability. The Enemy: A shadowy Consortium of back-room conspirators determined to throw the world into utter chaos using widespread terror tactics. The Heroes: A new 'direct action' operation known as Task Force TALON to counter massive military assaults, rescue hostages, conduct classified spy missions, take prisoners and stop an unpredictable enemy bent on toppling the world's governments. Command ultra-realistic modern military units Power-packed combination of high-end cinema, video effects and live action Intense multiplayer operations for up to eight players Real urban combat, including POW captures and landscape destruction Gripping storyline by NY Times bestselling author, Dale Brown

Name: Crusader Kings II
Description:
The Dark Ages might be drawing to a close, but Europe is still in turmoil. Petty lords vie against beleaguered kings who struggle to assert control over their fragmented realms. The Pope calls for a Crusade to protect the Christians in the Holy Land even as he refuses to relinquish control over the investiture of bishops - and their riches. Now is the time for greatness. Expand your demesne and secure the future of your dynasty. Fill your coffers, appoint vassals, root out traitors and heretics, introduce laws and interact with hundreds of nobles, each with their own agenda. A good lord will always need friends to support him. But beware, as loyal vassals can quickly turn to bitter rivals, and some might not be as reliable as they seem... Stand ready, and increase your prestige until the world whispers your name in awe. Do you have what it takes to become a Crusader King? Crusader Kings II explores one of the defining periods in world history in an experience crafted by the masters of Grand Strategy. Medieval Europe is brought to life in this epic game of knights, schemes, and thrones... Key features: Start a game at any point between 1066 and 1337 and play until 1453 Pick a Christian lord and make sure his dynasty survives as you play a succession of his descendants through the ages Gain Prestige for every successive character you play, furthering the glory of your Dynasty Expand your feudal domain - and keep it from falling apart Unravel the plots of your courtiers and vassals, each with their own opinions and agendas Take up the Cross and fight the Moor, the Heathen and the Heretic. Defend against the onslaught of the Mongol Horde Struggle with the Pope for control of the bishops Relive the Middle Ages with up to 32 other players in a competitive multiplayer mode

## "Not For Broadcast": Take Control of the National Nightly News

In the darkly comedic game "Not For Broadcast," you step into the high-stakes role of a news editor. The entire nation is watching, and the ultimate decision of what airs rests solely with you. This isn't merely about reporting the news; it's about actively shaping it, managing escalating chaos, and appeasing sponsors, all while navigating a minefield populated by egotistical celebrities, deceitful politicians, and peculiar advertisers.

### Your Responsibilities as the Ultimate Editor

As the editor, you wield significant power over the broadcast. Your key responsibilities include:

*   **Selecting Camera Angles:** Choose the most dramatic or scandalous shots to maximize audience engagement.
*   **Censoring Content:** Utilize the prominent red button to bleep out profanity and sensitive material, ensuring the broadcast aligns with various audience sensitivities and political climates.
*   **Curating Headlines:** With an abundance of news, you determine which stories make the final cut. You can frame a footballer as a hero or a villain, directly influencing public perception.
*   **Choosing Advertisements:** Hand-pick sponsors, some of whom may be questionable, to bolster the budget and contribute to the game's comedic absurdity.

### The Show Must Go On: Uninterrupted Broadcasting

"Not For Broadcast" immerses you in a world where the show must continue, irrespective of unfolding pandemonium. Whether facing a category 5 storm or existential threats, your duty is to keep broadcasting. The game challenges your ability to maintain audience attention, even as the news content grows increasingly outlandish.

### Navigating the Chaos: From Levity to Darker Themes

While the game provides moments of lightheartedness through celebrity mishaps and quirky commercials, it also delves into more serious subject matter. You will encounter discussions concerning war and political unrest. The game encourages you to filter out the surrounding chaos, concentrate on the advertisements, and disregard the increasingly frantic commentary from the news crew behind the scenes. As the developers themselves suggest, "Everything’s fine." Your primary objective is to keep the general public entertained and the broadcast operational, no matter the circumstances. You are the artist, and the broadcast is your canvas.

Name: Suzerain
Description:
As President Anton Rayne, lead Sordland during your first term of this text-based narrative RPG. Navigate a political drama, driven by conversations with your cabinet members and other significant figures in a country with its own complicated history. With looming border conflicts, entrenched corruption, economic crisis and people desperate for reform, as leader the difficult choices fall on your shoulders as you strive to uphold your election promises. In 1954, the country of Sordland is emerging from a 20-year dictatorship, following a bloody civil war. You play as a charismatic young man, Anton Rayne, who has surprised everyone by rising to the top of the party in power and getting elected as the new President of Sordland. The people are hungry for democratic reforms after decades under a traditionalist power. The economy is in shambles and the political landscape is shifting. Neighboring superpowers are watching closely, and there are military threats on the horizon. As President, you have the final say but every choice you make has an impact. Your colleagues, the opposition, corporations; everyone has a point of view. Think and act carefully: once enacted your choices can not be reversed. Good luck, Mr. President. The game opens with a prologue in which Anton lives through formative events that shape his history from childhood through to the moment he is elected. Take this further by customising your look and style. At the end of Anton’s term, visualize how his choices impacted the country and how he lands on the Sordish political spectrum. Work closely with the Cabinet and prominent figures to forge strong policies and practices. You will need to keep your allies on your side and carefully consider where you will compromise your values and who you will make an enemy of. Everyone has their own ambitions in play. Leading a country is demanding. Face constant conflict about which is more important, serving the country or supporting your family. Is it possible to be a good father and a good president at the same time? Weighty, dramatic conversations : Navigate intricate conversations in this 400K-word branching political drama. Every choice has consequences : Make difficult choices on security, economy, diplomacy and more. Even outside the office, your values and beliefs will be challenged. Make allies and enemies : Interact with a wide array of characters with different personalities and ideologies. The oath of office versus family and values: See the real impact of the choices made in office on your family and close relationships Pay attention to current events : Follow the situation in Sordland through reports and news. What will your legacy be? : You can take the country in many different directions, resulting in one of 9 different major endings. Every decision you make is final: there is an autosave feature that does not allow loading earlier saves. Make choices carefully.

## Anno 1800: Forge Your Industrial Empire

Welcome to the dawn of the Industrial Age in **Anno 1800™**, a pivotal moment where your choices will **define your legacy**. This installment in the renowned city-building series challenges players to navigate the **rapidly evolving technological landscape** and the **malicious political arena** of the 19th century. Your quest is to build an empire, from the smog-filled cities of Europe to the teeming jungles of South America, in an era rich with innovation, conspiracies, and changing allegiances.

The core gameplay of Anno 1800 revolves around several key pillars:

*   **Metropolis Building:** Construct **huge, thriving metropolises** that meticulously cater to the needs of your growing population.
*   **Logistics and Trade:** Design **efficient logistic networks** and establish a profitable web of trade routes to connect your burgeoning cities.
*   **Global Exploration:** Settle an exotic new continent and dispatch **expeditions around the globe** to uncover new resources and opportunities.
*   **Diplomacy and Warfare:** Outmaneuver opponents through **clever diplomacy, strategic trade, or decisive warfare**.

Anno 1800 seamlessly blends beloved features from two decades of Anno history with **innovative new gameplay mechanics**, delivering a rich city-building experience. This includes a **story-based campaign** to guide your journey, a **highly customizable sandbox mode** for ultimate player freedom, and the classic **Anno multiplayer experience** for competitive and cooperative play.

Fan-favorite features making a return include:

*   **Individual AI opponents** offering unique challenges.
*   **Shippable trade goods** crucial for your economy.
*   **Randomly generated maps** ensuring unique playthroughs.
*   **Multi-session gameplay** for deeper strategic planning.
*   The introduction of **items** to further enhance your empire.

To truly bring this pivotal historical era to life, Anno 1800 introduces several **all-new features**:

*   **Expeditions:** Send crews of specialists across the globe in search of **fame and fortune**.
*   **Workforce Management:** The new workforce feature makes managing your factories **more demanding and realistic than ever**.
*   **South American Settlement:** Lay claim to the **"black gold"** powering this new age of industry by settling South America.

"We are committed to making Anno 1800 the best Anno game yet," stated a representative from Ubisoft Blue Byte. "Your feedback is invaluable as we shape the future of the franchise." Players are invited to join the development team from Ubisoft Blue Byte by visiting **anno-union.com** for the latest news, development insights, and behind-the-scenes content. Here, gamers can share their feedback, vote on features, create content, and test the game during development, helping to **shape the game** and leave their mark on this crucial moment in human history.

Name: Tropico 3
Description:
Engage in a tropical power trip! Become the dictator of a remote island during the Cold War. Charm, persuade, intimidate, oppress, or cheat your people to stay in power! Are you a kind and generous leader? A corrupt and ruthless tyrant ruling with an iron fist? Turn your island into a tourist paradise or an industrial power. Make promises to the electorate or slander political adversaries to get the crucial votes for the upcoming elections. Send your avatar to congratulate the people, visit the island of another player, or just sun-bathe on the Caribbean beach. Play the Cold War superpowers against each other to your maximum advantage. Tropico 3 offers a tongue-in-cheek, light-hearted take on real world issues like third world politics, corruption and totalitarian regimes. A campaign consisting of 15 missions Random map generator Timeline editor The Avatar — customizable and under the player's control Election speeches Simulation of the life, family, and political views of each Tropican Vehicles and Roads New buildings and new units

In Tropico 6, El Presidente returns to lead your banana republic, presenting an evolution of the beloved dictator simulation. This installment introduces the groundbreaking ability to manage **multiple islands simultaneously** within vast archipelagos, a first for the series. This expansion brings a host of new challenges and strategic considerations as you navigate the complexities of governing an island nation spread across a wider geographical area.

To overcome the logistical hurdles of an archipelago, Tropico 6 offers **completely new transportation and infrastructure possibilities**. Players can now:

*   **Build bridges** to physically connect their islands, facilitating the movement of goods and citizens.
*   **Construct tunnels**, providing alternative and potentially more secure or efficient transit routes.
*   **Transport citizens and tourists** using a variety of enhanced methods, including taxis, buses, and aerial cable cars, adding a new layer of urban planning and citizen satisfaction management.

Beyond infrastructure, Tropico 6 enhances the player's ability to project power and prestige. Agents can be dispatched on **raids to foreign lands** with the objective of stealing iconic **world wonders and monuments**. These stolen treasures can then be added to your personal collection, serving as a testament to your dictatorial prowess and international influence. Imagine the satisfaction of seeing the Statue of Liberty or the Eiffel Tower gracing your island!

The game also emphasizes the personal touch of a dictator. Players have the freedom to **customize the looks of their palace at will**, choosing from various extras to reflect their unique style and power. Furthermore, **election speeches are back**, allowing El Presidente to directly address the populace, make grand promises, and attempt to secure their continued loyalty, even if those promises are ultimately unkeepable.

Tropico 6 features a **revised research system** that places a significant focus on the political aspects of being the world's greatest dictator. This means that technological advancements and societal developments are intrinsically linked to your political maneuvering and strategic decisions.

In times of political turmoil and social unrest, the people are calling for visionary leaders. Tropico 6 challenges you to prove yourself once again as either a feared dictator or a peace-loving statesman. You will shape the fate of your very own banana republic through **four distinctive eras**, each presenting unique opportunities and obstacles. You must face new challenges on the international stage and always keep the needs of your people in mind, balancing their demands with your own ambitions. The game also supports **online multiplayer for up to 4 players**, allowing for competitive or cooperative dictatorial endeavors.

Name: Tropico 4
Description:
The world is changing and Tropico is moving with the times - geographical powers rise and fall and the world market is dominated by new players with new demands and offers - and you, as El Presidente, face a whole new set of challenges. If you are to triumph over your naysayers you will need to gain as much support from your people as possible. Your decisions will shape the future of your nation, and more importantly, the size of your off-shore bank account. Tropico 4 expands on the gameplay of the previous game with new political additions ∼ including more superpowers to negotiate with, along with the ability to elect ministers into power to help get your more controversial policies passed. But remember to keep your friends close and your enemies closer as everyone has an agenda! Your political mettle will be thoroughly tested, as new natural disasters will have the populace clamoring for you and your cabinet to help them recover from some of the worst Mother Nature can dish out. Key Features: New campaign consisting of 20 missions on 10 new maps. 20 new buildings including Stock Exchange, Shopping mall, Aqua Park and a Mausoleum to El Presidente. Six new interactive disasters including volcanoes, droughts and tornadoes. Council of Ministers – selected citizens to ministerial posts in the government to help push through your more controversial decisions. National Agenda – receive objectives from Tropican factions, foreign geopolitical powers or opportunities relating to current island events such as ongoing disasters. Trading system – import and export goods to/from other nations to boost your economy or production.

Name: Orwell: Keeping an Eye On You
Description:
Big Brother has arrived - and it’s you. Investigate the lives of citizens to find those responsible for a series of terror attacks. Information from the internet, personal communications and private files are all accessible to you. But, be warned, the information you supply will have consequences… Orwell is a new governmental security program that has the power to survey the online presence of every person in The Nation. It can monitor all personal communications and access any computer. To preserve the privacy of citizens, human researchers examine the data Orwell finds and decide which pieces of information should be passed on to the security forces, and which should be rejected. Selected from thousands of candidates, you are Orwell’s first human researcher. And when a terror attack rocks the Nation’s capital city of Bonton, Orwell, and you, are immediately put to the test. Starting with a single person of interest, you'll help the security forces build out and profile a network of potential culprits. But are these people really terrorists? What does the information you reveal to Orwell say about them? What if you find out things about them that not even their loved ones know? What is the real price of maintaining the security that the Nation is yearning for? Key Features Investigate the digital lives of citizens. Search web pages, scour through social media posts, dating site profiles, news articles and blogs to find those responsible for a series of terror attacks. Invade the private lives of suspects. Listen in on chat communications, read personal emails, hack PCs, pull medical files, make connections. Find the information you need to know. Determine the relevance of information. Only the information you provide will be seen by the security forces and acted upon. You decide what gets seen and what does not, influencing how the suspects will be perceived. Secure the freedom of the Nation. Find the terrorists so the citizens of the Nation can sleep safe, knowing Orwell is watching over them. MATURE CONTENT WARNING Please note, Orwell includes mature language at multiple points throughout the game as well as mature themes and is not suitable for younger players.

Name: Beholder 2
Description:
Every citizen of our great State dreams of working at the Prime Ministry! You are lucky, intern – your dream has come true! While you are at the bottom of the career ladder, that is more than many of your fellow citizens will ever achieve! Have you already decided what you're going to become? Will you become a diligent and responsible officer decorated by the Wise Leader himself? Or will you become a hardline careerist capable of destroying anyone who stands between you and the Prime Minister's seat? Or maybe you are just a whistle-blower? If so, who sent you? And why? Whatever the case, you are now part of the Ministry! From this moment on, no one beyond these walls has ascendance over you! You are free to shape your own future! So, what are you going to become?

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition
Description:
DISCLAIMER This legacy version of COH1 will also give you access to the latest updated version of COH1 - simply called 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. PLEASE USE THE LATTER TO PLAY ONLINE , and visit the associated pages to join the COH1 Steam Community & Modding scene: COH1 Community Hub COH1 Steam Workshop DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

Name: Company of Heroes
Description:
DISCLAIMER FOR ADDITIONAL USER REVIEWS , please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page. DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

## Call of Duty® 4: Modern Warfare®: A New Era of Action

Infinity Ward, the acclaimed creators of the Call of Duty® series, presents Call of Duty® 4: Modern Warfare®, an action-thriller that redefines cinematic gaming by plunging players into the heart of modern warfare for an intense and immersive experience. This installment places players in the shoes of both a U.S. Marine and a British S.A.S. soldier, navigating treacherous global hotspots and confronting a dangerous rogue enemy group that poses a significant threat to world stability. Success hinges on sophisticated technology, superior firepower, and coordinated land and air assaults, where speed, accuracy, and communication are paramount.

Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare boasts an impressive arsenal of over 70 authentic modern-day weapons and gear, including assault rifles with laser sights, Claymore mines, .50 caliber sniper rifles, and M-249 SAW machine guns. Players can also utilize accessories like night-vision goggles and ghillie suits for maximum concealment, ensuring they are fully equipped for any mission.

The game delivers a visceral modern battle experience, spanning from the individual soldier to satellite-level operations. Air support is critical for success, and players will engage in adrenaline-pumping deployments such as fast-roping from tactical helicopters, riding in an armada of attack choppers, utilizing jets to neutralize enemy strongholds, and engaging hostiles from aerial gunships.

Featuring stunning next-generation graphics, Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare immerses players in its cinematic intensity. Advanced special effects, such as realistic depth of field, rim-lighting, character self-shadowing, texture streaming, and physics-enabled effects, create a highly photo-realistic gaming experience. This visual fidelity, combined with realistic battle chatter and the award-winning Call of Duty sound design, ensures players face battle like never before.

Building on the success of Call of Duty 2, the multiplayer component offers a persistent online experience designed for enhanced community interaction. Key features include:

*   **Create-a-Class:** Customize gear to suit your playstyle.
*   **Experience Points:** Earn unlockables and perks.
*   **Matchmaking and Leaderboards:** Track your progress and compete with others.

Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare's multiplayer is designed for easily accessible and addictive online play for all.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

## Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition: A Comprehensive Guide

Embark on an epic journey through the cosmos with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**, the definitive collection for fans of deep, turn-based space strategy. This ultimate package brings together the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, its award-winning expansion, **Dark Avatar**, and the thrilling new addition, **Twilight of the Arnor**.

### Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords - The Foundation of Galactic Domination

At its core, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords** places you in the command chair of a burgeoning space-faring civilization. Your mission: to navigate a perilous galaxy, balancing **economic growth, technological advancement, diplomatic maneuvering, cultural influence, and military might**. Forge crucial alliances, wage interstellar wars, and strive for ultimate galactic supremacy. The game offers both randomly generated galactic maps for endless replayability and a compelling multi-mission campaign that unravels the saga of the ancient and formidable Dread Lords.

### Dark Avatar: Expanding the Strategic Frontier

The first expansion, **Dark Avatar**, significantly enriches the **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords** experience. Beyond the typical additions of new opponents, units, and a fresh campaign, this pack introduces **game-changing mechanics**. Players can now exploit **asteroid belts for valuable resources**, colonize **unique planets requiring specialized technologies**, and deploy **spies for sabotage and destabilization** – or to defend their own worlds. The expansion also introduces **new diplomatic treaties** and an **enhanced artificial intelligence engine**, ensuring a more challenging and dynamic gameplay experience.

### Twilight of the Arnor: The Final Confrontation

Set in the year 2227, **Twilight of the Arnor** plunges the galaxy into a devastating war orchestrated by the malevolent Dread Lords. However, the remaining factions, spearheaded by humanity, have devised a desperate plan to eradicate this ancient threat. This expansion pack introduces a wealth of new content, including **Terror Stars**, **unique technology trees tailored to each civilization**, and robust **map, custom scenario, and campaign editors**. Prepare for new ship types, innovative planetary improvements, and much more, all designed to expand the rich Galactic Civilizations II universe.

### Key Features for Galactic Conquest

The **Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition** boasts a suite of features designed for an immersive and engaging strategy experience:

*   **Stunning Visuals:** A **beautiful 3D engine** vividly brings planets, stars, asteroids, and intense ship battles to life.
*   **Customizable Fleets:** Design your own unique starships piece-by-piece in the **intuitive Shipyard**.
*   **Diverse Civilizations:** Command one of a dozen distinct civilizations or **create your own custom faction**.
*   **Multiple Victory Paths:** Achieve dominance through **military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy, or ascension**.
*   **Dynamic Galaxies:** Experience **addictive gameplay** across galaxies that range from tiny to gigantic.
*   **Intelligent AI:** A **superior multi-threaded artificial intelligence** provides a formidable challenge without resorting to unfair advantages.
*   **Online Competition:** Test your skills against players worldwide via the **Metaverse** and climb the leaderboards.
*   **Extensive Modding Support:** The **fully moddable design** empowers players to create unique opponents, graphics, and scenarios.
*   **Advanced Diplomacy:** Engage in complex interactions, including **trading, forming treaties, and forging alliances**.

As one developer noted, "The depth of strategy in Galactic Civilizations II is truly remarkable. Players are constantly presented with meaningful choices that impact the fate of their empire." This comprehensive edition offers an unparalleled opportunity to experience the full scope of this critically acclaimed space strategy saga.

Name: Crusader Kings III
Description:
Your legacy awaits. Choose your noble house and lead your dynasty to greatness in a Middle Ages epic that spans generations. War is but one of many tools to establish your reign, as real strategy requires expert diplomatic skill, mastery of your realm, and true cunning . Crusader Kings III continues the popular series made by Paradox Development Studio, featuring the widely acclaimed marriage of immersive grand strategy and deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying. Take command of your house and expand your dynasty through a meticulously researched Middle Ages. Begin in 867 or 1066 and claim lands, titles, and vassals to secure a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is only a footnote as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, either planned… or not. Discover a sprawling simulated world teeming with peasants and knights, courtiers, spies, knaves and jesters, and secret love affairs. An extensive cast of historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced. Explore a vast medieval map stretching from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and the British Isles in the west to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. Claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires. Each character is larger than life, with traits and lifestyle choices determining their actions and schemes. Prompt fear and dread as you rule with an iron fist, or inspire your subjects with magnanimous deeds. Genetics can be passed along to your children, be it the gift of genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with the appropriate guardians or educate them yourself. If found wanting, marry them off or despatch them through other means. Customize your ruler and noble house, from appearance to attributes, and create a monarch worthy of all their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm and grant titles to whom you see fit - or usurp your liege to claim their crown as your own. Be wary of rivals, from restless serfs to revengeful concubines. The shadows stir frequently, and danger lurks around every darkened corner. Recruit agents and other unsavory elements to undermine, blackmail, or murder those who stand in your path. Or be inspired by the bard and ballad, and seduce your way to power and influence. Blood will flow. Assemble men-at-arms units and powerful knights. Manage your battlefield tactics and armies. Raid and plunder nearby lands or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your major conflicts. Be a pious king to invite the religious powers to your side, or design your own faith as you battle between everlasting fame or eternal damnation. Bring novel innovations to your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions to increase the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm. The paths to follow are limitless: experience thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions tailored to each and every conceivable situation and character. There are countless ways of securing and keeping your place in the history books.

Call of Duty® plunges players into the heart of World War II, offering an unparalleled experience of the conflict's most pivotal moments. This immersive title focuses on the experiences of ordinary soldiers and overlooked heroes from a coalition of nations whose collective efforts were instrumental in shaping the modern world.

The gameplay emphasizes the chaotic reality of combat, placing players within a cohesive squad. This squad dynamic is crucial, with members providing vital covering fire and ensuring the safety of their injured comrades. Beyond authentic squad movements and tactical maneuvers, the game highlights the unique personalities and specialized training of each soldier, which become evident on the battlefield. It's a powerful reminder that no single soldier or nation achieved victory alone.

For the first time in the series, Call of Duty® presents the war from a variety of viewpoints, allowing players to experience the conflict through the eyes of American, British, and Russian soldiers. This multi-perspective approach enriches the narrative and provides a more comprehensive understanding of the war's global impact.

The game features:

*   **24 Missions:** Spanning four interconnected historical campaigns, these missions offer a deep dive into key WWII events.
*   **Diverse Objectives:** Players will engage in a wide array of mission types, including:
    *   Sabotage operations
    *   Full-scale assaults
    *   Stealth missions
    *   Vehicle combat scenarios
    *   Rescue operations
*   **Authentic Presentation:** The game meticulously recreates the authentic weapons, iconic locations, historical vehicles, and the visceral sounds of war. This dedication to detail creates an incredibly realistic and intense World War II experience.

Call of Duty® is a product of Activision Publishing, Inc., with © 2003 marking its release. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights are reserved. Other trademarks and trade names belong to their respective owners.

Name: Silent Hunter® III
Description:
The king of submarine simulations returns with an all-new 3D engine, new crew command features, and more realistic WWII naval action than ever before. The movie-like graphics and simple, tension-filled gameplay make this the perfect game for the realism fanatic and the casual gamer. Realistic and immersive environment: The suspense-filled atmosphere includes realistic 3D water modeling, day/night cycles, and historically accurate subs, ships, and aircraft. The detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare. A deadly array of U-boats and weapons: Playable U-boats include Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines. Take aim against Allied convoys and warships. In recreating the great submarine battles of WWII, players will hide in silence just below threatening escort ships, fire deadly torpedoes, or surface and pound enemies with the deck gun. Dynamic campaign: Create your own realistic naval war story. Your military career will be influenced by successful command decisions in an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign. Accessible to players of all skill levels: Players will experience a simplified learning curve that will be easier to handle than standard simulations. Use the naval academy tutorial to learn the basics. Customize the realism settings for play that appeals to a variety of WWII combat fans. Command your crew: The crew will take orders and evolve based on the results of each patrol. Multiplayer cooperative play: For up to eight players via LAN.

## Half-Life: Alyx: A VR Revolution in the Iconic Franchise

**Half-Life: Alyx** marks a triumphant return for Valve to the beloved Half-Life universe, reimagined entirely for virtual reality. This groundbreaking title plunges players into an **impossible fight for survival** against the formidable alien race known as the Combine. Set between the pivotal events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2, the narrative places you in the shoes of **Alyx Vance**, humanity's last beacon of hope.

### The Combine's Iron Grip and the Seeds of Resistance

Since the catastrophic Black Mesa incident, the Combine's dominion over Earth has only intensified. They have systematically corralled the remaining human population into heavily controlled cities. Among these confined survivors are some of Earth's most brilliant minds, including **you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance**. As **founders of a nascent resistance movement**, you and your father have secretly continued your vital scientific endeavors. Your clandestine activities involve **performing critical research** and **developing invaluable tools** for the brave few who dare to defy the Combine's oppressive rule. Each day brings new insights into your enemy's operations, fueling your relentless pursuit of a **critical weakness**.

### Immersive VR Gameplay: Built from the Ground Up

Valve's ambitious return to the Half-Life universe was **purpose-built for virtual reality**, a decision that fundamentally shapes the core gameplay experience. VR technology was specifically leveraged to unlock the **deep environmental interactions, intricate puzzle-solving, expansive world exploration, and visceral combat** that define Half-Life.

*   **Strategic Aiming:** Lean around cover, such as a broken wall, or duck under a Barnacle to execute **impossible shots**.
*   **Resourceful Scavenging:** **Rummage through shelves** to locate essential items like healing syringes and shotgun shells.
*   **Interactive Manipulation:** **Manipulate tools** to bypass alien security systems and hack interfaces.
*   **Tactical Distraction:** **Toss objects**, like a discarded bottle, through windows to divert enemy attention.
*   **Intense Encounters:** Experience the visceral thrill of **ripping a Headcrab off your face** and expelling it from your immediate vicinity.

### Empowering the Community with Source 2 Tools

Half-Life: Alyx goes beyond its compelling single-player campaign by **including a robust set of Source 2 tools**. These powerful tools empower **any player to build and contribute their own custom levels** and environments. These community-created experiences are then made readily available for others to enjoy through the **Half-Life: Alyx Steam Workshop**. Valve’s renowned level authoring tool, **Hammer**, has been significantly updated to incorporate all the game's virtual reality gameplay mechanics and components, ensuring a seamless and powerful creation experience for aspiring level designers.

Name: Undertale
Description:
Welcome to UNDERTALE. In this RPG, you control a human who falls underground into the world of monsters. Now you must find your way out... or stay trapped forever. ((Healthy Dog's Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.)) features: Killing is unnecessary: negotiate out of danger using the unique battle system. Time your attacks for extra damage, then dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters. Original art and soundtrack brimming with personality. Soulful, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor. Created mostly by one person. Become friends with all of the bosses! At least 5 dogs. You can date a skeleton. Hmmm... now there are 6 dogs...? Maybe you won't want to date the skeleton. I thought I found a 7th dog, but it was actually just the 3rd dog. If you play this game, can you count the dogs for me...? I'm not good at it.

## Street Fighter V: Your Ultimate Guide to the Iconic Fighting Game

Street Fighter V offers an unparalleled fighting game experience, blending intense head-to-head combat with a rich roster of characters and diverse gameplay modes. Whether you're a seasoned competitor or new to the franchise, this guide will help you dive into the action.

### Choose Your Champion and Uncover Their Stories

With **16 unique characters** at launch, each possessing a distinct backstory and specialized training challenges, players can find a fighter that resonates with their playstyle. Mastering these characters involves delving into their personal narratives and honing their unique skill sets.

### Engage in Diverse Battles: Online and Offline

Street Fighter V provides a **comprehensive suite of match options** to cater to all player preferences.

*   **Ranked Matches:** Compete against players globally, aiming to climb the leaderboards and **earn Fight Money** for in-game purchases.
*   **Casual Matches:** Enjoy relaxed, unranked bouts perfect for practicing or playing with friends.
*   **Battle Lounge:** Create custom lobbies to **challenge friends directly** in private matches.

The game also features **cross-play compatibility**, allowing players on PlayStation 4 and Steam to compete against each other, significantly expanding the player pool.

### Arcade Edition: Expanded Content and Rewards

The **Arcade Edition** of Street Fighter V enhances the base game with additional modes and content. This version includes:

*   **Arcade Mode:** A nostalgic journey through classic Street Fighter eras.
*   **Team Battle Mode:** Assemble and lead your dream team to victory.
*   **Extra Battle Mode:** Participate in challenging online encounters to **earn valuable rewards, XP, and Fight Money**.

### Unlock a Universe of Content with Fight Money

**Fight Money** serves as the primary in-game currency, essential for expanding your collection. Use it to acquire:

*   **New characters**
*   **Cosmetic costumes**
*   **Unique stages**

### Experience "A Shadow Falls": The Cinematic Story Mode

Dive into the **cinematic story mode, "A Shadow Falls," available for FREE!** This narrative unfolds M. Bison's sinister plan to plunge the world into darkness using seven Black Moons, a plot that grants him immense power.

### Champion Edition: The Definitive Street Fighter V Experience

**Street Fighter V: Champion Edition** represents the **ultimate compilation**, integrating all content from the original release and the Arcade Edition, with select exclusions (Fighting Chance costumes, brand collaboration costumes, and Capcom Pro Tour DLC).

This comprehensive package includes:

*   **Every character released** post-Arcade Edition.
*   **All available stages**.
*   Over **200 distinct costumes**.

### Master the V-System and Special Attacks

The **dynamic V-System** is a cornerstone of Street Fighter V's strategic gameplay, offering unique mechanics for each character.

#### V-Trigger: Unleash Devastating Techniques

Activating **V-Trigger** allows characters to unleash powerful, game-changing techniques. This ability, fueled by the V-Gauge, can inflict **significant damage** or turn the tide of a match.

#### V-Skill: The Foundation of Your Offense and Defense

**V-Skills** are fundamental abilities that provide unique moves or buffs, crucial for filling the V-Gauge. Mastering these skills is key to building offensive pressure and defensive options.

#### V-Reversal: Disrupt Your Opponent's Momentum

The **V-Reversal** is a defensive maneuver that costs one V-Gauge stock but can interrupt an opponent's aggressive sequence, creating an opportunity to **regain control of the fight**.

#### Special Attacks and EX Special Attacks

**Special Attacks** are essential for controlling space and building your Critical Gauge. **EX Special Attacks** are powered-up versions of these moves, consuming one bar of the Critical Gauge for enhanced effects and damage.

#### Critical Art: The Ultimate Finisher

The **Critical Art** is the most potent attack in Street Fighter V. Once your **Critical Gauge is fully charged**, unleashing this devastating move can secure a decisive victory.

Name: Borderlands 2
Description:
A new era of shoot and loot is about to begin. Play as one of four new vault hunters facing off against a massive new world of creatures, psychos and the evil mastermind, Handsome Jack. Make new friends, arm them with a bazillion weapons and fight alongside them in 4 player co-op on a relentless quest for revenge and redemption across the undiscovered and unpredictable living planet. Key Features: All-New Characters and All-New Classes: Four all new playable classes including the Siren, the Commando, the Gunzerker and the Assassin. Step into the role of the Gunzerker, whose highly deadly skills allow him to dual-wield any two weapons found in the game. Not only that, you will build on that skill to do more things with two guns than you ever imagined possible. Dual machine guns? Cool. Dual rocket launchers? Of course! Dual Sniper Rifles? Sure, if that’s your thing! Want to try other styles? More tactical perhaps? There are multiple classes to choose from! Dynamic Co-op online, and LAN: Share your adventures with friends both online and via LAN. Borderlands 2 features a seamless system enabling you to drop in and drop out of a campaign without ever having to restart the game. On top of that you can even take your new gear from any game to any other! World Connected Story: Find yourself left for dead in the frozen tundra of Pandora as you begin your quest of revenge and redemption. Expose the evil surrounding the Hyperion Corporation and take on the perpetrator of a universe-wide grand deception -- the nefarious Hyperion CEO, Handsome Jack. (Oh, also: he's stolen credit for the opening of the Vault.) 87 Bazillion...Everything: In addition to the new gun system, you will lust after procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods and much, much more. And you thought the original Borderlands had a ton of loot! Brand new environments on Pandora: Hunt through entirely brand new areas of Pandora that are more alive than ever! From the arctic tundra, through the dangerous grasslands, past the mysterious corrosive caverns to beyond, you’ll be surprised by the unpredictable world of Pandora at every turn! Brand new enemies: A whole slew of new enemies are out there to kill you in Borderlands 2. Hulking, gorilla-like Bullymongs, vicious predatory Stalkers and the Hyperion mechanical army, run by Handsome Jack, are just some of the new enemies in Borderlands 2. Note: The Mac and Linux versions of Borderlands 2 are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Guacamelee! Gold Edition is a vibrant Metroidvania-style action-platformer that immerses players in a richly imagined, magical world inspired by traditional Mexican culture and folklore. This unique setting is populated by a cast of memorable and distinctive characters, contributing to the game's captivating atmosphere. Guacamelee! masterfully blends the beloved open-world exploration of classic Metroidvania titles with a robust melee combat system, an innovative dimension-switching mechanic, and engaging local cooperative multiplayer.

A core design principle of Guacamelee! is the seamless integration of combat and platforming. Many of the moves and abilities players acquire are not only essential for overcoming enemies but also crucial for navigating the intricate environments and uncovering hidden pathways. Players step into the boots of a luchador, a masked wrestler, who must use the power of their fists to battle a formidable evil threatening their world. As you journey through this mystical Mexican landscape, you'll learn powerful wrestling techniques, such as the devastating Rooster Uppercut, and master the Dimension Swap ability, which is key to unlocking new areas and uncovering the game's many secrets.

The Gold Edition of Guacamelee! boasts several key features that enhance the gameplay experience:

*   **Integrated Combat and Platforming:** Utilize your combat moves not only for fighting enemies but also for overcoming challenging platforming sections.
*   **Dimension Swapping:** Seamlessly switch between the World of the Living and the World of the Dead to solve puzzles and access new areas.
*   **'El Infierno' Level Expansion:** Test your mettle in the fiery challenges of El Infierno, a special expansion level where you can unlock powerful new costumes for both Juan and Tostada.
*   **Player Costumes:** Customize your hero by swapping costumes, each offering different attributes and contributing to new achievements.
*   **Steam Integration:** Enjoy full support for Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save, and Big Picture Mode, along with collectible Trading Cards.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Create and share your own custom costumes with the community through the Steam Workshop.
*   **2-Player Local Co-op:** Experience the entire story with a friend through drop-in/drop-out local cooperative play.
*   **Chickens:** Prepare for an abundance of chickens, a recurring and often humorous element throughout the game.

For those seeking an even more expansive adventure, Guacamelee! Super Turbo Championship Edition is also available. This enhanced version builds upon the Gold Edition by introducing additional powers, new levels, more enemies, and significant improvements to both gameplay and graphics.

Name: West of Loathing
Description:
Say howdy to West of Loathing -- a single-player slapstick comedy adventure role-playing game set in the wild west of the Kingdom of Loathing universe. Traverse snake-infested gulches, punch skeletons wearing cowboy hats, grapple with demon cows, and investigate a wide variety of disgusting spittoons. Talk your way out of trouble as a silver-tongued Snake Oiler, plumb the refried mysteries of the cosmos as a wise and subtle Beanslinger, or let your fists do the talking as a fierce Cow Puncher. Explore a vast open world and encounter a colorful cast of characters, some of whom are good, many of whom are bad, and a few of whom are ugly. Features: a sprawling open world, chock full of danger, quests, puzzles, and mysteries lush hand-drawn black and white graphics full stick-figure customization thousands of jokes, gags, and goofs crunchy turn-based combat (but only if you want it) liberal use of the Oxford comma over 50 hats disreputable saloons several gulches a drunk horse NOTE: characters are not literally colorful (the game is in black and white)

Name: STEINS;GATE
Description:
-Decide The Fate Of All Mankind- CAN YOU CHANGE THE COURSE OF FATE? AND SAVE THE ONES CLOSEST TO YOU? STEINS;GATE is the award-winning time travel science-fiction interactive visual novel developed by 5pb. and Nitroplus. It is widely considered to be one of the finest Visual Novels ever made. STEINS;GATE follows a rag-tag band of tech-savvy young students who discover the means of changing the past via mail, using a modified microwave. Their experiments into how far they can go with their discovery begin to spiral out of control as they become entangled in a conspiracy surrounding SERN, the organisation behind the Large Hadron Collider, and John Titor who claims to be from a dystopian future. Interaction with the game takes place through the “phone trigger” system, where the player can receive calls and text messages and decide whether to reply to them or not, changing the outcome of the game’s plot. Features: Non-Linear Visual Novel - Discover multiple different endings depending on your choices in-game. HD 1080P - Enjoy the game with HD graphics and illustrations. Phone Trigger System - Interact via Rintaro’s cellphone to answer or ignore calls, and send and recieve emails. Your everday choices in life steer the story! 30-50 hours of reading time 8/10`EXEMPLARY` -DESTRUCTOID- `A REMARKABLE WORK` -US GAMER- `A MODERN CLASSIC` -KOTAKU- `UNFORGETTABLE` -GAMEMASTER- ★★★★★5/5 -EUROGAMER- 34/40 -Famitsu-

Name: Pony Island
Description:
Pony Island is a suspense puzzle game in disguise. You are in limbo, trapped in a malevolent and malfunctioning arcade machine devised by the devil himself. The devil detests having his puzzles solved and poor programming exposed; you will need to think outside the box to proceed and you will be insulted when you do. In Pony Island you will... Peer behind the rotting curtain of 'Pony Island' to repair its broken code Be forced to play along with The Devil's demented game of ponies Explore the depths of the cryptic software system that runs His game This game is about as indie as it gets. Daniel Mullins - Creator Simon Jenkins - Consulted Designer Jonah Senzel - Musician @EnzoPiou - French Localization FenixTM - Italian Localization @77pali - German Localization Luis Redin (Fusti) - Spanish Localization Kenneth Mohr - Danish Localization Alan K. Cirino - Portuguese Localization Berke Oğuz Yılmaz - Turkish Localization @TomWojcik1 - Polish Localization Barrie van der Velden - Dutch Localization Farhad Alyshev - Russian Localization Video playthrough by LoganicYT !

Name: Russian Subway Dogs
Description:
Welcome, comrades! Meet Russian Subway Dogs! We have done extensive, totally legal research in order to fine tune this chaotic arcade-simulation for what it's like to scavenge for food from Russian commuters. Surviving isn't easy when you are dodging volatile vodka, rival dogs, and the rare and dangerous Subway Bear! A new game from the creators of They Bleed Pixels. Inspired by real life stray dogs who’ve learned to navigate Moscow’s subway system! Take on Campaign Mode with dozens of levels and over 100 unique challenges from your boss kitty: The Proletaricat. Highly replayable Endless Mode with online leaderboards and a score-driven difficulty algorithm that keeps each round fresh! Featuring detailed pixel art of Moscow’s world famous, ornately decorated subway stations. Play as your favourite animals from other indie games and comics (full list below!) From fire and ice to toxic chocolate and cooking wildlife for food, Russian Subway Dogs is full of simulated systems to discover and exploit! Original Soundtrack by Peter Chapman aka COINS (Guacamelee!, LittleBigPlanet Karting, Modnation Racers) Whether you’re a dog person or more of the feline persuasion, Russian Subway Dogs has you covered. Play as a range of unlockable critters with a whole pack of special guests including: Question Hound from KC Green's Gunshow Fidel from Fidel Dungeon Rescue Nacho & Rad Shiba from VA-11 HALL-A Ratcoon from Ruin of the Reckless Uay Chivo from Guacamelee! Nidhogg from Nidhogg 2 They Bleed Pixels inspired Clawed Kitty! Simple enough for a puppy to pick up, but still packed with challenge! Run and jump along subway platforms. Bark behind people to scare up food and bounce vodka around the stage. Soon you’ll be discovering high-level strategies, such as cooking and eating rival wildlife with vodka explosions. Travel the Moscow subway in Campaign Mode! Survive and thrive through dozens of levels and over 100 unique challenges from your feline leader, the Proletaricat and the mischievous Kittens! Can you finish the level with a vegetarian diet? While protecting a bear? What about preventing the pigeons from cannibalizing each other? Complete enough levels and challenges and you'll discover the secret station at the end of the line! Feeling competitive? Climb the online leaderboards in Endless Mode. Random Proletaricat mini-challenges and our special score driven difficulty algorithm keep each play through fresh! From fire and ice, to cooking food and toxic chocolate, Russian Subway Dogs is full of simulated systems, allowing lots of freedom in how you earn points and deal with rival wildlife. Will you eat the tasty but toxic chocolate for major points, or feed it to that pesky poodle that keeps stealing your shawarma? Drink hot sauce to gain powerful fire barks or feed it to a pigeon for some fire pooping air support? In Russian Subway Dogs it’s up to you to use your knowledge and abilities to stuff your stomach and inflict as much mayhem as possible! Musician Peter Chapman (Guacamelee!, LittleBigPlanet Karting, Modnation Racers) has created a banging original soundtrack packed with Slavic sounds and Baltic beats combined with electronic dance music.

Name: The End Is Nigh
Description:
If you are reading this you are probably dead... Just kidding, you aren't dead... YET! See, in the future, everything dies... for the most part. and this is a game about just that. The End Is Nigh! -the management Gameplay: The End Is Nigh is a sprawling adventure platformer where the player takes control over Ash, one of few 'things' that have 'survived' the 'end of the world'. Follow Ash as he flops his way through a future of pain and suffering. Feel his stress levels rise as you throw him into an endless swarm of decaying, mutant animal-like creatures and help aid his final epic quest... to simply make a friend (out of pieces of people he finds along his journey). Oh, also you collect video game cartridges and tumors! if that does anything for ya. Features: 600+ levels! 12+ explorable chapters! 20+ collectible and fully playable mini game cartridges! (each with their own tiny achievements!) 80+ achievements that will make you feel good about yourself 100s of collectible little squishy tumors! loads of hidden extras and endings that you will probably see someone else find before you do! and stress!

Name: F.E.A.R.
Description:
Be the hero in your own cinematic epic of action, tension and terror. A mysterious paramilitary force infiltrates a multi-billion dollar aerospace compound, taking hostages but issuing no demands. The government responds by sending in a Special Forces team only to have them obliterated. Live footage of the massacre shows an inexplicable wave of destruction tearing the soldiers apart. With no other recourse, the elite F.E.A.R. (First Encounter Assault Recon) team is assembled to deal with the extraordinary circumstances. They are given one simple mission: Evaluate the threat and eliminate the intruders at any cost. F.E.A.R. Extraction Point Extraction Point kicks off where the original game ended – with a bang. As the helicopter which the F.E.A.R. team is on attempts to leave the vicinity, it instead winds up crashing. The F.E.A.R. team is thus forced to seek out an alternate extraction point, all the way battling the now free Alma and her paranormal minions across a destroyed city. F.E.A.R. Perseus Mandate As the first F.E.A.R. team and Delta Force fight for control of the situation, a second F.E.A.R. team is sent in to shed some light on Armacham Technology Corporation's (ATC) dark past. As a member of a secondary F.E.A.R. team, you are brought in to discover more information regarding the secret project at the ATC facilities. The multiplayer component for this expansion is no longer available.

Name: Year Walk
Description:
In the old days man tried to catch a glimpse of the future in the strangest of ways. Experience the ancient Swedish phenomena of year walking through a different kind of first person adventure that blurs the line between two and three dimensions, as well as reality and the supernatural. Venture out into the dark woods where strange creatures roam, on a vision quest set in 19th century Sweden. Solve and decipher cryptic puzzles, listen for clues, and learn about mysterious folklore creatures in the built-in encyclopedia as you seek to foresee your future and find out if your loved one will ever love you back. Mysteries and clues await everywhere in Year Walk, but to fully understand the events that took place on that cold New Year's Eve, you will have to delve deeper than the adventure and lose yourself between fact and fiction. This edition of Year Walk features several new additions: • New locations within the game • Map • Updated art • New puzzles • Integrated Encyclopedia about the mysterious myths and creatures encountered in the game • Hint system • Steam Achievement Puzzles ... and more!

## F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin - A Descent into Terror

**F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin** plunges players into a desperate fight for survival just moments before the catastrophic blast unleashed by the original F.E.A.R. team. You step into the boots of **Special Forces Sgt. Michael Becket**, whose routine mission rapidly devolves into a harrowing battle against the unleashed fury of **Alma Wade**. As Alma's terrifying powers spiral out of control, your squad is thrust into an apocalyptic landscape, desperately seeking a way to **destroy her**.

### Strategic Combat and Enhanced Abilities

The game emphasizes **strategic environmental combat**, offering opportunities for both players and enemies to exploit the surroundings. Players can leverage their character's **enhanced reflexes** to slow down time, allowing for precise maneuvers and tactical advantages. The experience is defined by **in-your-face close-quarter action**, unfolding across a diverse range of indoor and outdoor environments. Prepare to face **all-new enemies** that employ **advanced combat tactics**, pushing your skills to the limit.

### Unraveling a Terrifying Mystery

"Test your nerves and face your FEARS as you battle new characters and unravel a terrifying mystery," the game challenges players. The **world interaction enhancements** are a key feature, allowing players to **create instant cover** or **remove obstacles**, further deepening the tactical possibilities.

### Multiplayer Mayhem and Visual Fidelity

Beyond the single-player campaign, F.E.A.R. 2 offers **multiplayer competition**, allowing players to engage with and against friends. The **enhanced graphics engine** elevates the action horror genre with **heightened visuals and effects**, creating a truly immersive experience. Enemies exhibit **realistic behavior**, utilizing the environment against you through **vastly enhanced enemy Artificial Intelligence**. Crucially, the game **maintains the authenticity of the Alma storyline**, providing the definitive continuation of the saga.

### Toy Soldier Update: A New Perspective on Multiplayer

The **Toy Soldier Update**, released on April 16, 2009, introduced a unique multiplayer experience. Players are shrunk to mere inches in height, battling within miniature environments.

#### FullTilt: Pinball Pandemonium

Experience F.E.A.R. 2 multiplayer from a new perspective in **FullTilt**. Players battle inside a **retro 1970's era pinball machine**, aptly named 'Snake Fist'. The **flippers, targets, spinners, and pop-bumpers** provide dynamic cover for fast-paced action. The **multi-level playfield and authentic sounds** contribute to the destructive atmosphere.

#### Cockroach: Hospital Horror

The **Cockroach** map offers a blood-drenched hospital room filled with heart-pounding action. Players can **climb up electrical cords, laboratory equipment, and pill bottles** within this tightly connected environment.

#### Recess: Sandbox Warfare

In **Recess**, players can wage mayhem from the top of a giant sandcastle to the cockpit of a toy bulldozer. The ability to **"go commando" and blend in with plastic army men** adds a unique tactical layer to this sandbox battlefield.

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's
Description:
Welcome to your new summer job at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza, where kids and parents alike come for entertainment and food as far as the eye can see! The main attraction is Freddy Fazbear, of course; and his two friends. They are animatronic robots, programmed to please the crowds! The robots' behavior has become somewhat unpredictable at night however, and it was much cheaper to hire you as a security guard than to find a repairman. From your small office you must watch the security cameras carefully. You have a very limited amount of electricity that you're allowed to use per night (corporate budget cuts, you know). That means when you run out of power for the night- no more security doors and no more lights! If something isn't right- namely if Freddybear or his friends aren't in their proper places, you must find them on the monitors and protect yourself if needed! Can you survive five nights at Freddy's? 'For all the simplicity of the game’s controls and premise, Five Nights at Freddy‘s is frightening. It’s a fantastic example of how cleverness in design and subtlety can be used to make an experience terrifying. Simple still images and proper character design steal the show in this game, and show that Scott Cawthon knows quite a lot about the secret fears people feel when looking at creepy dolls and toys. It’s elegant in how it sows fear, and is a must-own for anyone who likes scary games.' -Joel Couture IndieGameMag.com This game was created using Clickteam Fusion!

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's 3
Description:
Thirty years after Freddy Fazbear's Pizza closed it's doors, the events that took place there have become nothing more than a rumor and a childhood memory, but the owners of 'Fazbear's Fright: The Horror Attraction' are determined to revive the legend and make the experience as authentic as possible for patrons, going to great lengths to find anything that might have survived decades of neglect and ruin. At first there were only empty shells, a hand, a hook, an old paper-plate doll, but then a remarkable discovery was made... The attraction now has one animatronic.

Name: Slender: The Arrival
Description:
You're on your own. No one to come for you. No one to help you. No one to hear you scream. Slender: The Arrival is the official videogame adaption of Slender Man, developed in collaboration with Eric 'Victor Surge' Knudson, creator of the paranormal phenomenon that has been terrifying the curious-minded around the world since its inception, with Mark Hadley and Blue Isle Studios. Back in 2012, Mark Hadley ( AgentParsec ) created a game that captivated gamers around the world. Slender: The Eight Pages was a short, experimental first-person game that helped breathe new life into the horror genre through its use of unadulterated tension and fear. Experience the horror all over again. Slender: The Arrival is the official re-imagining and expansion of the original game created by Mark Hadley, teamed up with the writers behind the Marble Hornets series and the development team at Blue Isle Studios . The Arrival features a brand new storyline, improved visuals, great replay value, and most importantly, survival horror at its best.

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
Description:
Welcome back to the new and improved Freddy Fazbear's Pizza! In Five Nights at Freddy's 2, the old and aging animatronics are joined by a new cast of characters. They are kid-friendly, updated with the latest in facial recognition technology, tied into local criminal databases, and promise to put on a safe and entertaining show for kids and grown-ups alike! What could go wrong? As the new security guard working nights, your job is to monitor cameras and make sure nothing goes wrong after-hours. The previous guard has complained about the characters trying to get into the office (he has since been moved to day-shift). So to make your job easier, you've been provided with your very own empty Freddy Fazbear head, which should fool the animatronic characters into leaving you alone if they should accidentally enter your office. As always, Fazbear Entertainment is not responsible for death or dismemberment.

Prepare to be immersed in the atmospheric and mysterious world of Kraven Manor, a game that challenges players to uncover its secrets, solve intricate puzzles, and confront a growing threat. As you explore the expansive manor, you'll discover that the key to unraveling its mysteries lies in a unique mechanic: the ability to dynamically alter your environment.

Located in the manor's extravagant entryway is an intricate scale model of Kraven Manor itself. By finding miniature room models scattered throughout the house and returning them to this central model, you can actively reshape the manor around you. As you place these miniature rooms, they will manifest in real space, creating new pathways and revealing hidden areas. Each new room you construct not only alters the physical layout but also exposes further revelations into the troubling past of William Kraven, the manor's enigmatic former resident.

Kraven Manor offers a compelling gameplay experience with several key features:

*   **Immersive First-Person Atmosphere:** Step into a hauntingly beautiful world rendered in first-person perspective, drawing you deeper into the manor's mysteries.
*   **Atmospheric Sound Design:** Experience chilling symphonies and unsettling sounds that will keep you on edge, making you constantly look over your shoulder.
*   **Architectural Gameplay:** Become the architect of Kraven Manor by constructing and manipulating its scale model, directly influencing the game world.
*   **Tension and Puzzles:** Prepare for a mounting threat and challenging puzzles that avoid cheap jump scares, focusing instead on psychological tension.
*   **Unique Antagonist:** Face a distinct and relentless antagonist who will pursue you throughout your journey, adding a constant sense of danger.
*   **Collectible Secrets:** Discover hidden secrets within the manor that lead to a very special and rewarding ending.
*   **Nightmare Mode:** For those seeking an even greater challenge, Nightmare Mode offers a scarier experience and a limited battery for your flashlight.
*   **Customization Options:** Enjoy robust graphical settings and custom key binding options to tailor the experience to your preferences.
*   **Multilingual Support:** Face your fears in 14 different languages, making the game accessible to a global audience.

Kraven Manor invites you to confront your deepest fears and test your resolve. The doors of this mysterious estate are open, and its secrets are waiting to be unearthed.

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's 4
Description:
This time, the terror has followed you home. In this last chapter of the Five Nights at Freddy's original story, you must once again defend yourself against Freddy Fazbear, Chica, Bonnie, Foxy, and even worse things that lurk in the shadows. Playing as a child whose role is yet unknown, you must safeguard yourself until 6am by watching the doors, as well as warding off unwanted creatures that may venture into your closet or onto the bed behind you.
