Utilize NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology allowing you to react quicker and hit harder combos with the responsive gameplay you crave on GeForce GPUs. Controls Customization Play your way. With support for the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide range of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard, you have the power to fine-tune every action to match your playstyle. Ultra-wide Support Immerse yourself like never before. Journey through the Norse realms taking in breathtaking vistas in panoramic widescreen. With 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, God of War™ presents a cinema quality experience that further expands the original seamless theatrical vision.

Name: Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition
Description:
Get the complete Galactic Civilizations II saga including the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords, the award winning expansion pack Dark Avatar, and the newest expansion pack Twilight of the Arnor! Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords: Galactic Civilizations II is the sequel to 2003's hit turn-based strategy game of the same name. The player takes on the role of the leader of a space-faring civilization and must guide its expansion in a hostile galaxy. Gamers must balance their economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military power to forge alliances, fight wars, and ultimately dominate the galaxy. The game is single-player and allows the player to play randomly generated galactic maps or play through a multi-mission campaign that tells the story of an ancient enemy called the Dread Lords. Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar: The expansion pack for Stardock's award-winning hit strategy game, Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords. This expansion pack not only adds the usual content that expansion packs tend to do such as new opponents, new units and a new campaign. It also greatly expands the game play of Galactic Civilizations II. New features include asteroid belts on the map that can be mined for resources, unique planets that require special technologies to colonize, spies to conduct sabotage and destabilization (or used to protect your worlds from the same), new types of diplomatic treaties, an enhanced artificial intelligence engine, and much more! Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor: The year is 2227 and the fire of war is consuming the galaxy thanks to the manipulations of the evil Dread Lords. But the remaining factions, led by the humans, have a plan to rid the galaxy of the Dread Lords once and for all. Expand the Galactic Civilizations II universe with Terror Stars, unique technology trees per civilization, Map editors, Custom Scenario makers, campaign editors, new types of ships, new planetary improvements, and much more! Key features: Beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, asteroids and ship battles to life. Create custom 3D ships piece-by-piece with your Shipyard. Play as any of a dozen unique civilizations or create your own. Multiple paths to victory: Military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy or ascension. Addictive gameplay: Dynamic galaxies ranging from tiny to gigantic. Superior multi-threaded artificial intelligence enables computer players to provide a challenge without having to cheat. Put your scores online via the Metaverse and compete with players from around the world. Fully moddable design enables players to create unique opponents, graphics and scenarios. Advanced diplomacy enables players to trade, make treaties, alliances and more.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Batman: Arkham City builds upon the intense, atmospheric foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, sending players flying through the expansive Arkham City - five times larger than the game world in Batman: Arkham Asylum - the new maximum security 'home' for all of Gotham City's thugs, gangsters and insane criminal masterminds. Featuring an incredible Rogues Gallery of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals including Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze and many others, the game allows players to genuinely experience what it feels like to be The Dark Knight delivering justice on the streets of Gotham City. Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition includes the following DLC: Catwoman Pack Nightwing Bundle Pack Robin Bundle Pack Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack Arkham City Skins Pack Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition packages new gameplay content, seven maps, three playable characters, and 12 skins beyond the original retail release: Maps: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Long, and Batcave Playable Characters: Catwoman, Robin and Nightwing Skins: 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond Batman, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin and Animated Nightwing

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Name: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
Description:
Guide two brothers on an epic fairy tale journey from visionary Swedish film director, Josef Fares and top-tier developer Starbreeze Studios. Control both brothers at once as you experience co-op play in single player mode, like never before. Solve puzzles, explore the varied locations and fight boss battles, controlling one brother with each thumbstick. A man, clinging to life. His two sons, desperate to cure their ailing father, are left with but one option. They must set out upon a journey to find and bring back the 'Water of Life' as they come to rely on one another to survive. One must be strong where the other is weak, brave where the other is fearful, they must be... Brothers. This is one journey you will never forget.

## Exploring the Vast World of Guild Wars 2

Guild Wars 2 invites players into the expansive world of Tyria, emphasizing **discovery and exploration**. Your **content guide** serves as a valuable companion, offering suggestions as you venture forth. Utilize your **compass** to locate points of interest, or simply choose a direction and let adventure unfold.

### Engaging with Tyria's Inhabitants and Events

Tyria is teeming with diverse characters, each with their own narratives and goals. Your **involvement is rewarded**, whether you're aiding them or hindering their endeavors. This engagement is facilitated through completing **Renown Hearts** and participating in **dynamic events**. For new players, a comprehensive **new player guide** is available.

### Seamless Player Interaction and Progression

A hallmark of Guild Wars 2's open world is its emphasis on **organic player interaction**. Assistance can be offered without formal parties, whether investigating a hidden **jumping puzzle** or confronting a challenging **world boss**. The game champions a playstyle free from the need to **grind**.

### Earning Experience and Character Customization

All activities, from reviving allies and defending against Risen to gathering resources, contribute to **earning experience points**. As you progress, you can **arm your character with a diverse arsenal of new weapons**. Each profession utilizes these weapons uniquely, and every weapon type offers a distinct playstyle. This can be further refined by unlocking and equipping **hundreds of skills and traits**.

### Structured PvP and Fashion Wars

For competitive players, Guild Wars 2 offers **structured PvP**, where **all players compete on an equal footing**. Access to max-level gear and build options ensures a fair and engaging experience. For those with a flair for aesthetics, **character design** offers a canvas for self-expression. Equipping new gear unlocks its **skins in your wardrobe**, leading to **thousands of possible combinations**. A **massive selection of collectible dyes** allows for further personalization.

### Expanding Your Experience with Expansions and Living World

Upgrading to a **Guild Wars 2 expansion** unlocks exclusive benefits such as **log-in rewards**, additional **character and bag slots**, and **expanded chat features**. In-game purchases can be made through the **Black Lion Trading Company**, with options to use your Steam Wallet for upgrades.

Expansions and **Living World seasons** introduce unique rewards and new **Masteries** that enhance character abilities. For example:

*   *Guild Wars 2: Heart of Thorns* allows you to **unlock and upgrade your glider**.
*   *Guild Wars 2: Path of Fire* enables you to **befriend a stable of mounts with powerful movement skills**.
*   *Guild Wars 2: End of Dragons* introduces the ability to **fish and pilot a skiff**.

Each expansion also provides access to **nine elite specializations**, offering new weapon choices, skills, and abilities. Additionally, the **Revenant profession** can be selected at character creation, allowing players to channel legendary figures from Tyria's history.

**Living World seasons** continue the game's narrative between expansions and are available for purchase through the Story Journal or in Gem Store bundles. Playing these episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries.

*   Living World episodes are accessible at level 80.
*   Relaunching the game may be necessary for upgrades to take effect.
*   Existing Guild Wars 2 accounts are not accessible via Steam.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

Name: DARK SOULS™ III
Description:
We are currently in the process of restoring the online servers for the DARK SOULS series on PC. We plan to restore online service for each game progressively, bringing back servers for DARK SOULS™ III once we complete the necessary work to correct the problem. We will provide additional updates as soon as the restoration schedule is finalized. We want to thank all our players for your patience and understanding as we work to fix this issue. Get the DARK SOULS™ III Season Pass now and challenge yourself with all the available content! Winner of gamescom award 2015 'Best RPG' and over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations. DARK SOULS™ III continues to push the boundaries with the latest, ambitious chapter in the critically-acclaimed and genre-defining series. As fires fade and the world falls into ruin, journey into a universe filled with more colossal enemies and environments. Players will be immersed into a world of epic atmosphere and darkness through faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity. Fans and newcomers alike will get lost in the game hallmark rewarding gameplay and immersive graphics. Now only embers remain… Prepare yourself once more and Embrace The Darkness!

## Apex Legends™: Conquer with Character in the Frontier

**Apex Legends™** invites you to conquer with character in a free-to-play* Hero Shooter set on the fringes of the Frontier. Here, legendary characters, each possessing powerful and unique abilities, team up to battle for fame and fortune. This is not just another Battle Royale; it's the next evolution of the Hero Shooter experience, offering deep-tactical squad play and bold innovations within a rugged world where anything goes.

### Master an Ever-Growing Roster of Diverse Legends

At the heart of Apex Legends is its **ever-growing roster of diverse Legends**. Each character is more than just a playable avatar; they are legendary figures with their own distinct personalities, strengths, and abilities. While these Legends are designed to be **easy to pick up**, the true challenge lies in **mastering their unique skill sets** to their fullest potential. As one developer noted, "The depth of our Legend abilities is what truly sets Apex apart. Players can spend hundreds of hours and still discover new synergies and strategies."

### Build Your Ultimate Crew Through Strategic Squad Play

Success in Apex Legends hinges on **building your crew** and leveraging **strategic squad play**. You'll need to choose your Legend wisely, combining their unique skills with those of your teammates to form the ultimate, unstoppable crew. Whether you find yourself battling across a massive, floating city in the iconic Battle Royale mode or engaging in intense, close-quarters duels within the Arenas, **thinking fast and coordinating with your teammates is paramount**. Discovering new tactics and powerful combinations through effective communication and synergy is key to victory.

### Experience Innovative Combat and an Ever-Expanding Universe

Apex Legends delivers **innovative combat** that keeps players on their toes. You'll need to **master an expanding assortment of powerful weapons and equipment**, learning the unique rhythms of each firearm to maximize your arsenal. The game constantly evolves with **limited-time modes** and a **boatload of new content introduced each season**, ensuring fresh challenges and opportunities.

Beyond the immediate thrill of combat, Apex Legends boasts an **ever-expanding universe**. The narrative continues to evolve, maps are dynamically altered each season, and new Legends are consistently introduced to the fray. This creates a living, breathing world where players can **make their mark on the Apex Games** through a multitude of distinctive outfits and join an ongoing adventure.

**Please note:** This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency. This currency can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.

## Sea of Stars: A Modern Take on Classic RPGs

Sea of Stars is an upcoming RPG that promises to **reimagine the classic role-playing experience** with a Sabotage Studio touch. The game aims to modernize core RPG elements such as turn-based combat, storytelling, exploration, and environmental interactions, all while delivering a healthy dose of nostalgia and pure, unadulterated fun.

### Innovative Turn-Based Combat

At the heart of Sea of Stars' gameplay is its **innovative turn-based combat system**. Players can increase their damage output and reduce incoming damage by **pressing the action button in sync with character animations**. Beyond timed hits, combat incorporates **multi-character combo attacks**, a **boosting mechanic**, and a strategic **'locks' system**. This system allows players to target enemy weaknesses with different damage types, effectively hindering powerful enemy attacks and spells. The developers have emphasized an **immersive combat experience**, notably by eliminating random encounters, separate battlefields, and the need for grinding.

### Seamless Exploration and World Navigation

Exploration in Sea of Stars is designed to be **fluid and engaging**. The game features a navigation system inspired by platformer expertise, breaking free from traditional grid-based movement. Players can **swim, climb, vault, jump off, and hoist themselves up ledges**, traversing the world seamlessly. This approach to movement ensures a more dynamic and interactive exploration experience.

### A Visually Stunning 2D World

The game boasts a **breathtaking world brought to life by a custom-made render pipeline**. This technology pushes the boundaries of 2D pixel-art games, creating a visually rich and immersive environment.

### Captivating Storytelling and Characters

Sea of Stars will feature **dozens of original characters and compelling story arcs** that guide players on a captivating journey. The narrative is designed to be a blend of epic, silly, and emotional moments, exploring classic RPG themes of adventure and friendship. As expected from a Sabotage production, players can anticipate **unexpected twists and events** throughout their playthrough.

### Engaging Side Activities

For those seeking a change of pace, Sea of Stars offers a variety of **engaging side activities**. Players can enjoy sailing, cooking, fishing, or visiting a tavern to listen to music or play the infamous tabletop game known as 'Wheels'. These systems are meticulously designed to **respect retro classics while offering a smooth and modernized experience**.

One of the developers stated, "We wanted to capture the magic of those beloved RPGs from our childhood, but also inject modern design sensibilities to create something truly special." This sentiment is evident in every aspect of Sea of Stars, from its combat to its exploration and narrative.

## Guilty Gear -Strive-: A New Era of Fighting Game Excellence

**Guilty Gear -Strive-** ushers in a new era for fighting games, meticulously crafted to welcome newcomers while offering the profound depth and creative freedom veteran players crave. This installment in the beloved Guilty Gear franchise delivers an experience brimming with over-the-top action, unparalleled style, and pure fun, all set against a heavy metal-inspired alternate future.

### The Epic Conclusion to a 20-Year Saga

*   **Culmination of a 20-year story:** Guilty Gear -Strive- brings a long-running narrative to its dramatic conclusion.
*   **Final confrontation:** Players will face off against "That Man," the enigmatic figure responsible for the world's devastation.
*   **Key characters:** Join Sol Badguy, his rival Ky Kiske, and a starting roster of 15 distinct characters as they fight for the fate of the universe. This is the astonishing conclusion to an epic narrative.

### A Symphony of Sight and Sound

Prepare for a sensory explosion with a high-octane soundtrack composed by the legendary Daisuke Ishiwatari, the series' creator. As you rock out to thrashing tracks, you'll be immersed in groundbreaking hybrid 2D/3D cell-shaded graphics. Arc System Works has pushed the boundaries of visual fidelity, delivering the most stunning and dynamic 3D cell-shaded visuals seen in a fighting game to date. As Daisuke Ishiwatari himself might say, the music is designed to be an integral part of the experience, stating, "The soundtrack is as important as the gameplay itself."

### Revolutionizing the Fighting Game Formula

Guilty Gear -Strive- introduces innovative gameplay systems designed for accessibility and depth.

*   **Quick grasp of fundamentals:** New players can quickly learn the basics.
*   **Deep, creative gameplay:** The mechanics preserve the celebrated depth and strategic freedom of Guilty Gear.
*   **Wall-breaking mechanic:** This addition opens up new and exciting strategic approaches to battle, encouraging players to adapt their tactics on the fly.

This focus ensures that every match is a unique and engaging experience.

The PC version of DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition introduces an untold chapter to the world of Lordran, sending players back in time to witness the era when Knight Artorias still lived. This expansion brings a wealth of new content designed to challenge even the most seasoned players.

**New Content Highlights:**

*   **New Bosses:** Prepare to face formidable new adversaries, including the Black Dragon, the Sanctuary Guardian, and the legendary Artorias of the Abyss.
*   **PVP Arena & Online Matchmaking System:** Engage in quick matchmaking for intense 1v1, 2v2, and 4-player battle royale modes.
*   **New Areas:** Explore distinct new environments such as Oolacile Township, Oolacile Sanctuary, Royal Wood, and the Battle of Stoicism, a dedicated training ground for online PVP.
*   **New Enemies:** Encounter a variety of fresh threats, including Wooden Scarecrows, Chained Prisoners, and Stone Knights.
*   **New NPCs:** Interact with new characters like Hawkeye Gough and Elizabeth, the keeper of the sanctuary.
*   **New Weapons and Armor:** Discover and equip powerful new gear obtained from the new bosses, enemies, and NPCs.

Dark Souls, developed by FromSoftware, the creators of Demon’s Souls, is a new action role-playing game set in a dark fantasy universe. It features familiar elements such as tense dungeon crawling, challenging enemy encounters, and unique online interactions. Dark Souls is a spiritual successor to Demon’s Souls, offering a new, despair-inducing world with a vast, vertically-oriented landscape. Players will navigate treacherous traps, face grotesque mobs, and battle gargantuan demons and dragons. Success hinges on learning from death in this unforgiving world.

The game's online component allows players to encounter the spirits of others, learn from their demise, and even summon them for co-op adventures or invade their worlds for PVP battles. Bonfires serve as crucial checkpoints, replenishing health and magic, but with the consequence of respawning all enemies. The game promises days of gameplay and a punishing difficulty level, designed to be one of the most challenging experiences of the year.

**Key Features:**

*   **Extremely Deep, Dark & Difficult:** The game is unforgiving yet rewarding, requiring strategic thinking to overcome seemingly impossible challenges.
*   **Fully Seamless World:** Explore an integrated dark fantasy world where dungeons and areas are seamlessly intertwined, emphasizing verticality.
*   **Mastery Earns Progression:** With approximately 60 hours of gameplay, the game features nearly 100 unique monsters and nuanced RPG systems, including weaponry, armor, miracles, and faith. Player success depends on mastering the use of magic spells, armor choices, and weapon types.
*   **Network Play:** Players can invade each other for PVP or team up for co-op boss encounters.
*   **Flexible Character Development & Role Play:** Players must carefully choose character ability enhancements to shape their progression style.
*   **Community:** Observe and empathize with other players' journeys, learn from their deaths, and leave messages to aid or mislead fellow players.
*   **Symbolic of Life & Hope:** The Bonfire offers a fleeting moment of warmth and calm in the dark world, serving as a recovery point and checkpoint.

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

## Forge Your Legend in Destiny 2: A Guardian's Guide

Embark on an epic journey through the solar system in Destiny 2, a universe brimming with mystery and responsive first-person shooter combat. As a Guardian, you'll wield powerful elemental abilities and collect unique gear to customize your character's appearance and combat style. Immerse yourself in a cinematic story, tackle challenging cooperative missions, and compete in a variety of player-versus-player (PvP) modes, either solo or with friends. Download Destiny 2 for free and begin writing your legend among the stars.

### The Guardian's Crucial Role

You are a Guardian, humanity's last line of defense against a solar system besieged by formidable villains. Your mission is to gaze towards the heavens and stand firm against the encroaching darkness. As one player noted, "The weight of the solar system rests on our shoulders, and it's a burden we embrace." Your legend starts now.

### Choosing Your Guardian Class

Destiny 2 offers three distinct Guardian classes, each with unique strengths and playstyles, allowing for diverse approaches to combat and exploration.

#### The Titan: Unyielding Defense and Offense

Disciplined and proud, Titans excel in both aggressive offense and steadfast defense. They can unleash devastating attacks with their fiery hammers, call down lightning, and stand toe-to-toe with any adversary. Their protective shields ensure their team can advance with confidence.

#### The Warlock: Masters of Arcane Power

Warlocks harness the universe's arcane secrets to both heal themselves and obliterate their enemies. They can rain destruction upon the battlefield, clearing swarms of foes with incredible speed. Allies fighting alongside a Warlock will witness the true might of the Light.

#### The Hunter: Agile and Precise Strikers

Agile and daring, Hunters are renowned for their quick reflexes and even quicker aim. They can unleash a golden gun, move through enemy ranks like a swift wind, or strike from the shadows. Their focus is on identifying threats, taking precise shots, and ending conflicts before they escalate.

### Cooperative and Competitive Multiplayer Experiences

Destiny 2 thrives on both cooperative and competitive experiences, allowing you to play with or against friends and other Guardians across various game modes.

#### Cooperative Adventures: Strength in Numbers

Embark on thrilling cooperative adventures filled with the promise of rare and powerful rewards. Engage with the narrative through story missions, quests, and patrols. Assemble a small fireteam to conquer quick Strikes and claim their final treasures. For the ultimate challenge, test your team's mettle with countless hours of raid progression, designed for the most dedicated fireteams.

#### Competitive Showdowns: Test Your Skills

Test your skills against other players in high-octane free-for-all skirmishes, team-based arena battles, and hybrid PvE/PvP competitions. Keep an eye on special events like Iron Banner, where you can earn exclusive, limited-time rewards before they vanish.

### The Pursuit of Exotic Gear

With thousands of weapons and millions of potential gear combinations, Destiny 2 empowers you to discover new equipment and forge your own distinct personal style. The pursuit of the perfect arsenal is a core element of the game, offering a deep layer of customization and progression.

Name: Skullgirls 2nd Encore
Description:
Skullgirls 2nd Encore is a beautiful, fast-paced, and critically acclaimed 2D fighting game that puts players in control of fierce warriors in an extraordinary Dark Deco world. Each of the 14 wildly original characters features unique gameplay mechanics and plenty of personality. Skullgirls is the perfect fighting game for casual and competitive fighting game fans alike. Includes fully voiced story mode, gorgeous animation, and a soundtrack by Michiru Yamane.

Name: Blasphemous 2
Description:
The second scripture in the Blasphemous series portends the return of The Penitent One, with a story that continues from the free Wounds of Eventide DLC for the original game, where The Heart in the sky heralded the return of The Miracle and foretold the birth of a new miracle child. Awakened in a strange new land, and displaced from his final resting place, The Penitent One is thrust back into the endless cycle of life, death, and resurrection, with no other option than to explore this perilous new world and uncover its long-forgotten secrets. Hordes of grotesque enemies stand in your way, awaiting final judgement by the brutal hand of the Penitent One, with titanic twisted bosses also lurking in the darkness, waiting for their chance to return you to the grave from whence you came. Taking them down won’t be easy, but with Blasphemous 2 offering more chances to customise and improve your skill set, along with several new unique weapons to wield with righteous zeal and unending fury, victory might just be within grasp. Ultimately, only one thing is certain… Penance Never Ends Explore a fuller Non-Linear world Having awoken in a strange new land, your journey starts anew in a series of enchantingly grotesque landscapes, oozing Gothic charm and littered with unforgiving traps. How you tackle the labyrinthian world remains at your discretion, there is no wrong turn to be made, only scores to settle Savage Combat The Penitent One shows no mercy, and with a series of new weapons offering new moves, brutal executions, and expanded combos, destruction will rain on any that stand in his way Customize your playthrough your way Blasphemous 2 offers up new ways to play, with the ability to customise and improve your base skillset, alongside several new unique weapons to unleash devastating attacks on enemies Grand Intense Boss Battles Hordes of monstrous foes stand between you and your goal; twisted bosses with unique attack patters and sundering abilities will put your skills to the test as you fight to stand triumphant when the dust settles Explore a deep new world A whole new world awaits, bustling with mysterious new NPCs to interact with, some will offer aid, some will ask for it, and others will send you on death defying missions to obtain long forgotten items. With so much to see and do, the stories and myths you encounter will help you unpick the games myriad of secrets, granting you a deeper understanding of this strange new world

Name: Rock of Ages
Description:
A rock-solid combination of rock-rolling action, deep strategy, and captivating art and music from different ages of history, this is a game of crush or be crushed! Two castles stand opposed; one is yours, the other is your enemy’s. They're a jerk and their castle sucks, so you’re going to try to smash it using an enormous boulder. Even as they build up their defenses, you're ready to roll over them in order to raze that unsightly tower. But beware! There’s a giant boulder headed your way, too. Key Features Brought to you by the insanely creative minds of ACE Team, makers of Zeno Clash! Take control of a giant boulder and crush your enemies! Use an amazing variety of units to defend your tower and knock your enemy off course. Bring your fight to both online and offline multiplayer! 3 different modes: War, Time Trial, and SkeeBoulder. 5 rich, historic periods of art and music create a gaming atmosphere unlike any other. FREE Original Soundtrack included with the game download.

Name: Galactic Bowling
Description:
Galactic Bowling is an exaggerated and stylized bowling game with an intergalactic twist. Players will engage in fast-paced single and multi-player competition while being submerged in a unique new universe filled with over-the-top humor, wild characters, unique levels, and addictive game play. The title is aimed at players of all ages and skill sets. Through accessible and intuitive controls and game-play, Galactic Bowling allows you to jump right into the action. A single-player campaign and online play allow you to work your way up the ranks of the Galactic Bowling League! Whether you have hours to play or only a few minutes, Galactic Bowling is a fast paced and entertaining experience that will leave you wanting more! Full Single-player story campaign including 11 Characters and Environments. 2 Single-player play modes including Regular and Battle Modes. Head to Head Online Multiplayer play Modes. Super Powers, Special Balls, and Whammies. Unlockable Characters, Environments, and Minigames. Unlock all 30 Steam Achievements!

Name: Alley Cat Bowling
Description:
Alley Cat Bowling is a crowd-play game designed around the classic ten pin bowling experience. Twitch streamers share the gameplay with their followers, interacting through chat and video. This is a gaming collision of bowling alleys and bowling balls and social video streaming at its finest, with a growing collection of playable bowling balls and bowling alleys. ****Twitch interactive game and twitch is required to play the game****

Name: VR Mini Bowling 2
Description:
VR Mini Bowling returns in this new and improved installment! VR Mini Bowling 2 brings the addition of Powerups, which completely change the way the game is played in this cross between bowling and mini golf! Please Note: If you already own VR Mini Bowling 1, you can use the 'Mini Bowling Upgrade Bundle' to buy VRMB2 at a lower price. If you do not yet own VRMB1, then I only recommend buying VRMB2 as it contains everything that VRMB1 has, plus more! Key Features: Bowling Ball Powerups (Split Ball, Big Ball, Orbit Ball, Fast Ball) 5 scoring modes 5 courses with 10 unique lanes each (including 3 re-imagined legacy courses) Traditional bowling lanes with realistic physics (spin, oil patterns)! Local Multiplayer 24 different bowling balls to choose from (16 unlockable) Personal best statistics for each lane and scoring mode Customizable Sound Effects Adjustable Throw Force Multiplier Global Leaderboards for each scoring mode on each course Improvements: Automatically pick up the ball by pressing the trigger. You no longer have to reach out and grab it (you still can if you want to though...) Re-imagined environments with improved visuals Simplified lobby for easier navigation and multiplayer selection When playing multiplayer, you can now switch players whenever you want. Each player can play thru all lanes at once, switch every 1 lane, every 3 lanes, etc. Multiplayer scoreboards available on all lanes Standard Mode: The newest game mode! Use powerups to boost your game and try to get the highest score possible! No Powerups Mode: Normal bowling rules apply, and no powerups are available. Try to get the highest score possible! Stroke Play Mode: This mode will put your skills to the test! Use powerups to you help knock down all of the pins in as few throws as possible. Rush Play Mode: Speed is the key in this mode. Knock down all of the pins as quickly as possible! You get unlimited throws in this mode so fire away! Normal Bowling Mode: Feel like changing it up and playing a regular game of bowling? You can! Play with or without Powerups, try Active Spin mode (you change the spin on the ball as it goes down the lane) and even change the oil pattern on the lane!

Name: Bomb Bowling 2
Description:
Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Knock the pins off the screen using explosions. Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click. The sequel of the Bomb Bowling. 50 levels with new contents. Hone your skills before a new challenges!

**Date Night Bowling: A Unique Experience for Romance and Strikes**

Looking for a fun and engaging way to connect with someone special? Date Night Bowling offers a fresh take on the classic bowling alley experience, blending competitive gameplay with charming romantic interactions. This arcade-style bowling game is designed to help you impress your date and potentially find that special connection.

The game allows for a highly customizable date-night bowling adventure. You can:

*   **Select your characters:** Choose from a diverse cast of characters, each with unique personalities and potential romantic chemistries.
*   **Decide your play style:** Opt to play solo, team up with an AI partner for practice, or challenge a friend in a local two-player match.
*   **Tailor the challenge:** Adjust the difficulty by selecting your ball weight, lane oil conditions, and overall game settings.

Beyond the bowling itself, Date Night Bowling incorporates a variety of engaging activities to keep the sparks flying. You'll have the opportunity to:

*   **Show off your skills:** While bowling prowess is a plus, impressing your date goes beyond the lanes.
*   **Engage in playful interactions:** This includes telling well-timed jokes, tossing popcorn, and offering a perfect shoulder rub.
*   **Win prizes:** Try your luck at the claw machine to win the cutest toy, a gesture that's sure to melt hearts.

The game features two distinct bowling alleys, each offering a unique late-night atmosphere complemented by groovy original music. The goal is to keep your partner happy and entertained throughout the experience. Success in these interactions could lead to a second date! So, grab a drink, slip on those bowling shoes, and let the romance begin in Date Night Bowling.

Name: Premium Bowling
Description:
Premium Bowling is as close to real bowling as you'll get without picking up a physical bowling ball. Start the game and enjoy ten pin bowling right at home! Play multiplayer competitions, conquer daily and weekly top lists and work your way to the top in player ranking and bowling leagues. Main Features: Play in VR or with monitor The best bowling physics simulation Many gorgeous bowling alleys Many balls and a Ball Editor Daily and weekly tops Continuous week-to-week player ranking Weekly and monthly E-Sports style leagues Teams to play co-op Many oil patterns Oil gets carried and wears out Single player, local multiplayer and online multiplayer support Voice chat Commentator Music player Cross play

Protoball is a futuristic sports shooter set in the year 2113, blending intense FPS/TPP shooting mechanics with dynamic sports gameplay. Currently undergoing a UE5 migration, the game's servers are temporarily offline but are expected to return soon. The developers express gratitude to their dedicated community for their invaluable contributions during the EA/Alpha testing phases, which were crucial in preparing the game for its Early Access launch.

In Protoball, players navigate arenas with athletic maneuvers, including jumping, sliding, running, grinding, and dashing, all in pursuit of passing the Protoball through their opponents' goals. The gameplay offers a rich array of offensive and defensive capabilities:

*   **Ball Handling:** Players can execute various passes, curve balls, bounce shots, and deceptive fake-outs.
*   **Combat Mechanics:** The game incorporates energy shield projectiles that can be fired at opponents or used defensively to deflect the ball, enabling spectacular plays.

The developers emphasize that player skill and creativity are the primary determinants of success, with the potential for limitless strategic depth. Protoball is currently in early development, and the team has ambitious plans for its future. Beyond the core sports mode, the game will feature other engaging modes such as Dodgeball, with the possibility of additional modes being introduced and rotated over time.

The game is designed with extensive customization in mind, featuring plans for endless cosmetic DLC and player personalization options. The developers have been actively adding more customizable content since August 2021. Protoball is being meticulously crafted to be a premier eSport, accessible and enjoyable for both hardcore and casual gamers. The development team is committed to continuously listening to and valuing player feedback, believing that collaborative development with the player base will elevate Protoball to its full potential. Evidence of this commitment can be seen in the numerous community suggestions and ideas that have already been incorporated, as confirmed by OG Playtesters within the game's Discord community. Players are encouraged to join the Discord server to contribute to the ongoing development and community building efforts.

Name: Bolf
Description:
Bolf combines the long game strategy of golf with the pin smashing technique of bowling. Bolf's swing system is easy to get to grips with, but flexible enough to reward practice. Mouse motions are translated to your bolfer's swing, while manual control of your virtual grip allows you to open up a club face or dig in for a little back spin. As you play, you'll earn experience to improve your abilities and cash you can use to customize your bolfer's appearance. Hitting heavy bowling balls hundreds of yards down a fairway can be a surprisingly peaceful way to spend some time! You'll be treated to beautiful scenery and a relaxing atmosphere while you play.

Name: VR SUPER SPORTS
Description:
*This game is a full-body VR experience. Before playing make sure your surroundings are clear of all friends, furniture, children, spouses, cats, dogs, long-lost siblings, and important equipment entrusted to you by your clients. Choose from a variety of sports Bowling：Select from bowling balls that vary in weight, color and control; Bumper option for bowling beginners Homerun Derby：A great stress reliever and work out! Knock the ball out of the park and into the stars! Soccer：Defend your goal from multiple opponents. Beware of the gold ball... Basketball：Using a classic 3-point contest format, rack up your score in the given time limit. Hit the money ball shot for extra points of course! Japanese Archery：Kyudo. An ancient Japanese tradition. Hold your breath for maximum accuracy and aim for the bulls-eye. Clay Shooting：The classic Olympic sport now in VR! Test your shot as you aim for the flying clay pigeons. Easy to play but requires skill to master! Boxing：Defeat 3 different opponents by dodging, throwing body shots, and landing blows to the face! Shake the controllers to get up if you fall ;) Kart: A thrilling sensation of speed; With complete-control you feel as if you are actually on the track; Features Bad at sports? No problem. For all ages and skill levels. Gamers and families alike can get in on the casual fun. Each sport requires a different set of skills and utilizes completely different controls. With the ranking feature, you can compete with players all over the world to achieve the highest score. Realistic experience in each sport Be prepared for a workout!

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a thrilling, momentum-based platformer that challenges players to navigate minimalist landscapes, evade deadly robots, and collect gold. This title marks the return of the N series to PC after a 12-year hiatus, with the developers dedicating that time to perfecting the platforming experience. The core gameplay of N++ revolves around mastering momentum to conquer levels and achieve high scores.

In this sci-fi setting, players must outmaneuver a variety of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots. The game features meticulously hand-crafted levels, explicitly *not* procedurally generated, ensuring an intense platforming challenge. Players utilize fluid movement to "solve" each level and reach the exit.

Beyond the extensive and demanding single-player campaign, N++ is packed with features for this final installment in the N series:

*   **Vast Content:** It boasts an impressive 4,340 hand-made levels.
*   **Community Creation:** Players can create custom levels, utilize a Level Editor, and share their creations globally.
*   **Competitive Play:** Leaderboards and replays are available for every level, including user-generated ones.
*   **Multiplayer Options:**
    *   Local Co-op Mode supports up to 4 players.
    *   Local Competitive Mode also supports up to 4 players.
*   **Challenging Modes:**
    *   Hardcore Mode offers an intense single-player challenge for skilled players.
    *   Hidden Secret challenges provide additional, difficult objectives to discover.
*   **Aesthetic Customization:**
    *   Features 63 tracks from top electronic artists.
    *   Offers 119 different color palettes to keep the game visually fresh.

N++ is designed for both short bursts of play and extended engagement, with no discernible skill ceiling, allowing for continuous improvement. The game offers bite-sized gameplay that can provide a lifetime of enjoyment.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

## Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time - A Legendary Adventure

Step into the **scorched sands of ancient Persia**, where a legend whispered in an ancient tongue speaks of a time steeped in **blood and ruled by deceit**. This is the captivating narrative of Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time, a game that redefined action-adventure gaming.

### The Prince's Perilous Journey

Drawn by the allure of dark powers emanating from a **magic dagger**, a young Prince inadvertently unleashes a **deadly evil** upon a once-beautiful kingdom. Now, aided by the cunning of a **seductive princess** and the **absolute powers of the Sands of Time**, the Prince embarks on a harrowing quest. His mission: to reclaim the Palace's cursed chambers and restore peace to his ravaged land.

### A Technological Marvel

Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time was a **technological masterpiece**, pushing the boundaries of what was possible on gaming consoles. Ubisoft's Montreal Studio achieved a **breakthrough in programming**, setting new standards across all facets of game production. This included:

*   **Advanced Physics:** Experience realistic environmental interactions and character movements.
*   **Stunning Lighting:** Immerse yourself in richly detailed and atmospheric environments.
*   **Groundbreaking Graphics:** Witness visuals that were ahead of their time, bringing ancient Persia to life.
*   **Fluid Animations:** Marvel at the Prince's agile and lifelike movements.

As one industry observer noted, the game was a "true testament to innovation, **raising the standards of games in all areas of production**."

### An Unmatched Hero and His Mythic Powers

The Prince returns to action-adventure gaming as an **unmatched hero**, wielding powers of mythic proportions. Prepare for:

*   **Gravity-Defying Acrobatics:** Traverse the environment with unparalleled agility and grace.
*   **Ferocious Fighting Skills:** Engage in intense combat with a variety of devastating moves.
*   **Time-Bending Abilities:** Master the Sands of Time to **erase the past, behold the future, and freeze the present** in real-time, creating unlimited gameplay variations.

### Exotic Worlds and Sweeping Adventure

Explore a **world never before explored in action-adventure gaming**. Medieval Persia, a land both mythical and deadly, unfolds with a **staggering array of landscapes and kingdoms** to discover and conquer. This is a **sweeping adventure of betrayal and triumph**, where the epic legends and deadly creatures of mythic Persia burn to life. The narrative is a suspense-filled tale, featuring more **twists and turns than the labyrinthine Palace itself**.

**Assassin's Creed Brotherhood: Lead the Assassins in Rome**

Step into the boots of Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a legendary Master Assassin, as he embarks on an epic struggle against the formidable Templar Order. Your mission: journey to Rome, the heart of power, greed, and corruption, to strike at the very core of the enemy. This endeavor demands more than just strength; it requires leadership. Ezio must command an entire Brotherhood, rallying them to his cause to defeat the entrenched tyrants.

### The Heart of the Brotherhood

In Assassin's Creed Brotherhood, players will experience Ezio's journey as he takes on the role of a true leader. He must not only hone his own deadly skills but also inspire and direct a growing guild of Assassins. This focus on collective action is central to the game's narrative.

### A New Era of Multiplayer

For the first time in the series, Assassin's Creed Brotherhood introduces an award-winning multiplayer experience. This mode allows you to select from a diverse cast of unique characters, each possessing their own signature weapons and assassination techniques, and test your skills against players worldwide. It's time to answer the call and join the Brotherhood.

### Key Features of Assassin's Creed Brotherhood

*   **Become a Legend:** Embark on a new adventure as the legendary Assassin Ezio, with over 15 hours of story-driven single-player gameplay.
*   **Lead and Command Your Brotherhood:** Recruit and customize your own guild of assassins. Train them, level them up, and command them to assist you in your quest.
*   **Utilize Secret Weapons:** Swiftly eliminate your foes with an arsenal of tools, including poison darts, parachutes, double hidden blades, hidden guns, and an advanced flying machine.
*   **Win the Heart of a City:** Invest your hard-earned currency to revitalize the crumbling capital. Rally the citizens to your cause and unlock additional factions and missions.
*   **Award-Winning Multiplayer:** Choose from multiple authentic character classes, each with unique weapons and killing moves. Explore richly detailed maps and engage in a variety of multiplayer modes for endless replayability.

### Downloadable Content Expansions

**Project Animus Update #1:** This DLC challenges Abstergo recruits to master free-running and refined hunting skills on the treacherous Mont Saint-Michel map and in the Advanced Alliance multiplayer mode.

**Project Animus Update #2:** The Pienza Map offers an ideal environment for free-running, allowing players to blend and disappear. The Chest Capture mode pits two teams of three players against each other, partnering with fellow Templars to defend or capture chests. This update also introduces the Templar Score feature to reward diligent work.

**The Da Vinci Disappearance:** Following the fall of the Borgias, Leonardo da Vinci is kidnapped. Ezio embarks on a relentless quest to recover him, uncovering new locations and gameplay features. The multiplayer component of this DLC is the most significant expansion to date, featuring a new map, new characters, and new game modes.

Name: Dying Light
Description:
From the creators of hit titles Dead Island and Call of Juarez. Winner of over 50 industry awards and nominations. The game whose uncompromising approach to gameplay set new standards for first-person zombie games. Still supported with new content and free community events years after the release. Survive in a city beset by a zombie virus! Discover the hard choice you will have to make on your secret mission. Will loyalty to your superiors prove stronger than the will to save the survivors? The choice is yours… VAST OPEN WORLD Roam the city with unprecedented freedom and bask in its unique atmosphere. Use parkour to scale every building and reach remote areas. CREATIVE COMBAT Engage in gory combat and discover limitless options to confront your enemies. Use the environment paired with various weapon types and abilities to gain an advantage. DAY AND NIGHT CYCLE Experience the dramatic shift in the world, as you change from a hunter to hunted at sundown. Face the coming threat or run away without wasting your time to look behind. 4-PLAYER CO-OP Join forces with other players and raise your chances of survival in an exciting co-op mode. Tackle the story campaign together and take part in regularly scheduled community challenges.

## DEATHLOOP: Shatter the Cycle on Blackreef

DEATHLOOP is a unique next-generation first-person shooter developed by Arkane Lyon, the acclaimed studio behind the Dishonored series. This title plunges players into a mind-bending scenario where two rival assassins are trapped in a perpetual time loop on the enigmatic island of Blackreef. The core gameplay revolves around breaking this cycle.

### The Eternal Cycle and Your Objective

Within this mysterious loop, players assume the role of Colt. His sole objective is to shatter the cycle of repetition. To achieve freedom, Colt must assassinate eight crucial targets before the day inevitably resets. Each failed attempt is not a setback, but a learning opportunity. Players are encouraged to experiment with new strategies, gather vital intelligence, and discover an expanding array of weapons and supernatural abilities. As the saying goes, "If at first you don't succeed... die, die again."

### Evolving Gameplay with Each Loop

Every new cycle presents a fresh chance to alter your approach. The knowledge acquired from previous attempts allows for a dynamic shift in playstyle. Whether you prefer a stealthy infiltration or a direct, guns-blazing assault, DEATHLOOP adapts to your choices. Within each loop, players will:

*   Uncover hidden secrets.
*   Gather crucial intel on their targets and the island itself.
*   Enhance their arsenal.

Equipped with a formidable collection of otherworldly abilities and potent weaponry, you'll employ every available tool to execute takedowns that are both visually striking and devastatingly effective. Strategic loadout customization is key to surviving this deadly game of hunter versus hunted.

### Single-Player Narrative with Optional Multiplayer Mayhem

DEATHLOOP offers a compelling single-player experience where players embody Colt, tasked with hunting down targets across Blackreef to break the loop and reclaim their freedom. However, the narrative is injected with a thrilling multiplayer element. Colt is relentlessly pursued by his rival, Julianna, who can be controlled by another player. For those seeking a more adversarial challenge, players can choose to embody Julianna and invade another player's campaign, aiming to eliminate Colt. This multiplayer component is entirely optional, and players can opt to have Julianna controlled by AI within their own game.

### Blackreef: A Stylish Prison

Arkane is celebrated for crafting artistically rich worlds brimming with multiple pathways and emergent gameplay opportunities. DEATHLOOP showcases a stunning retro-future environment, heavily influenced by 1960s aesthetics, which feels like a character in its own right. While Blackreef presents a visually captivating wonderland, for Colt, it serves as his prison. It's a world steeped in decadence, where death holds no consequence, and its inhabitants are perpetually engaged in revelry, effectively keeping Colt captive within the endless loop.

Name: Assassin's Creed 2
Description:
Assassin’s Creed® 2 is the follow-up to the title that became the fastest-selling new IP in video game history. The highly anticipated title features a new hero, Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble, and a new era, the Renaissance. Assassin’s Creed 2 retains the core gameplay experience that made the first opus a resounding success and features new experiences that will surprise and challenge players. Assassin’s Creed 2 is an epic story of family, vengeance and conspiracy set in the pristine, yet brutal, backdrop of a Renaissance Italy. Ezio befriends Leonardo da Vinci, takes on Florence’s most powerful families and ventures throughout the canals of Venice where he learns to become a master assassin. EZIO, A NEW ASSASSIN FOR A NEW ERA Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian noble who will learn the ways of the assassins after his family was betrayed and he looks to seek vengeance. He is a lady’s man, a free soul with panache yet has a very human side to his personality. Through him, you become a master assassin. RENAISSANCE ITALY Italy in the 15th century was less a country and more a collection of city-states where families with political and economic strength began to take leadership roles in cities like Florence and Venice. This journey through some of the most beautiful cities in the world takes place in a time in history where culture and art were born alongside some of the most chilling stories of corruption, greed and murder. A NEW-FOUND FREEDOM You will be able to perform missions when you want and how you want in this open-ended world that brings back free-running and adds elements such as swimming and even flying to the adventure. The variety in gameplay adds another layer for you to truly play through the game any way you choose. DYNAMIC CROWD Discover a living, breathing world where every character is an opportunity for the player. Blending in with the crowd is easier, working with in-game characters provide ample rewards but can also lead to surprising consequences. BECOME A MASTER ASSASSIN Perfect your skills to become a master assassin where you brandish new weapons, learn to disarm enemies then use their weapons against them, and assassinate enemies using both hidden blades. Please note that as of November 19th, 2018, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible. (MAC ONLY)

**Rise of the Tomb Raider™: 20 Year Celebration - A Comprehensive Expansion**

The "20 Year Celebration" edition of Rise of the Tomb Raider offers an expansive experience, bundling the critically acclaimed base game with a comprehensive Season Pass. This package introduces a wealth of new content, significantly enhancing Lara Croft's latest adventure.

The expansion delves deeper into Lara's world with several key additions:

*   **Croft Manor Exploration:** Step into the iconic Croft Manor with the new "Blood Ties" story. This narrative segment allows players to explore Lara's ancestral home and uncover its secrets.
*   **Defend Croft Manor:** Following the "Blood Ties" story, players must defend Croft Manor against a terrifying zombie invasion in the "Lara's Nightmare" mode.
*   **Co-Op Endurance Mode:** For the first time, players can team up with a friend in the new online Co-Op Endurance mode. This mode challenges survivors to brave extreme conditions together.
*   **Extreme Survivor Difficulty:** A new "Extreme Survivor" difficulty setting pushes players to their absolute limits, demanding mastery of survival mechanics.
*   **Tomb Raider III Inspired Gear:** The celebration includes an outfit and weapon inspired by the classic Tomb Raider III, offering a nostalgic nod to the series' roots.
*   **Classic Lara Skins:** Five classic Lara Croft skins are also included, allowing players to customize Lara's appearance with iconic looks from her past.

Existing downloadable content is also integrated, presenting further challenges:

*   **Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch:** This DLC challenges players to explore a new tomb harboring an ancient terror.
*   **Cold Darkness Awakened:** In this mode, players must combat waves of infected predators, testing their combat prowess.

**Key Features of Rise of the Tomb Raider:**

*   **Lara’s Journey:** The narrative follows Lara as she uncovers an ancient mystery that draws the attention of the ruthless organization known as Trinity. Her quest to find a legendary secret before Trinity leads her to the myth of the Lost City of Kitezh. Lara embarks on her first true Tomb Raiding expedition to Siberia in pursuit of this lost city and its hidden secrets.
*   **Woman vs. Wild:** In Rise of the Tomb Raider, Lara faces not only human adversaries but also the formidable power of nature. Players will hunt animals to craft weapons and scavenge for rare resources within richly detailed ecosystems. The game features stunningly hostile environments, characterized by treacherous conditions and unstable landscapes that will test Lara's endurance to its breaking point.
*   **Guerilla Combat:** Players can utilize the environment to their advantage, scaling trees and diving underwater for stealthy takedowns or direct assaults. Lara’s gear, weapons, and ammunition can be configured to suit various playstyles, from stealthy approaches to aggressive gunplay. The ability to craft explosives on the fly adds an element of chaos, while Lara’s signature combat bows and climbing axe remain essential tools.
*   **Return to Tomb Raiding:** The iconic tombs are back and more elaborate than ever. Rise of the Tomb Raider features vast, awe-inspiring ancient spaces filled with deadly traps. Players will solve intricate environmental puzzles and decipher ancient texts to reveal hidden crypts, uncovering a world brimming with secrets.

## Assassin's Creed 2: A Renaissance of Vengeance

Assassin's Creed® 2, the highly anticipated sequel to the fastest-selling new IP in video game history, plunges players into the vibrant yet brutal world of Renaissance Italy. This epic narrative centers on Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble driven by family, vengeance, and conspiracy.

### Introducing Ezio Auditore da Firenze

Ezio is a charismatic and free-spirited nobleman who transforms into a master assassin after a devastating betrayal of his family. His journey is one of personal growth, where players will guide him to hone his deadly skills and seek retribution.

### The Backdrop: Renaissance Italy

The 15th century in Italy was a period of burgeoning city-states, with powerful families vying for control. Assassin's Creed 2 captures this era, showcasing the artistic and cultural rebirth alongside tales of corruption and murder in iconic cities like Florence and Venice.

### Unprecedented Player Freedom

Assassin's Creed 2 introduces a new level of player agency with its open-ended world. Players can tackle missions at their own pace and in their preferred style. The game expands upon the signature free-running mechanics, incorporating new abilities such as swimming and even flight, offering a truly dynamic gameplay experience.

### A Living, Breathing World

The game's dynamic crowd system creates an immersive environment where every NPC presents an opportunity. Players can blend seamlessly into crowds, and interacting with in-game characters can yield significant rewards, though sometimes with unexpected outcomes.

### Mastering the Art of Assassination

Players will refine their assassin skills through a variety of new mechanics. This includes:

*   **Weapon Mastery:** Wielding new armaments and learning to disarm opponents.
*   **Counter-Attacks:** Utilizing enemy weapons against them.
*   **Signature Takedowns:** Executing stealthy assassinations with the iconic hidden blades.

**Note:** As of November 19th, 2018, online features, including Multiplayer and Co-op modes, are no longer supported for this game (MAC ONLY).

Name: Dishonored 2
Description:
Game Description Reprise your role as a supernatural assassin in Dishonored 2. Praised by PC Gamer as “brilliant”, IGN as “amazing” and “a super sequel, IGN as “amazing” and “a superb sequel”, declared a “masterpiece” by Eurogamer, and hailed “a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class” by Game Informer, Dishonored 2 is the follow up to Arkane Studio's first-person action blockbuster and winner of more than 100 'Game of the Year' awards, Dishonored. Play your way in a world where mysticism and industry collide. Will you choose to play as Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano? Will you make your way through the game unseen, make full use of its brutal combat system, or use a blend of both? How will you combine your character's unique set of powers, weapons and gadgets to eliminate your enemies? The story responds to your choices, leading to intriguing outcomes, as you play through each of the game's hand-crafted missions. Story Dishonored 2 is set 15 years after the Lord Regent has been vanquished and the dreaded Rat Plague has passed into history. An otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, leaving the fate of the Isles hanging in the balance. As Emily or Corvo, travel beyond the legendary streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, the once-dazzling coastal city that holds the keys to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and powerful new abilities, track down your enemies and take back what’s rightfully yours. Key Features The Assassins As fully voiced characters, Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano now bring their own perspectives and emotional responses to the world and story. Use each character’s set of powers, gadgets and uniquely-tuned weapons in creative ways as you explore the world – whether you fight your way through the city streets or sneak across the rooftops - and which enemies you decide to eliminate or spare. Supernatural Powers Advanced bonecharm crafting and all-new upgrade trees allow you to customize your powers in vastly different ways. Become a living shadow to silently stalk your targets, link enemies so they share a common fate, or mesmerize your foes and dominate their minds. Choose from nearly infinite combinations of violence, nonlethal combat, powers and weapons to accomplish your objectives. Imaginative World From the grimy, rat-infested streets of Dunwall to the lush, exotic coasts of a decaying Karnaca, immerse yourself in stylized locales created by Arkane’s premiere art and narrative teams. The world is a character in its own right, rich with story, architecture and eclectic characters. It is also punctuated by signature mission locations, such as the Dust District, ravaged by dust storms and warring factions, and a madman’s mansion made of shifting walls, deadly traps and clockwork soldiers. The Void Engine Dishonored 2 is beautifully brought to life with the new Void Engine, a leap forward in rendering technology, built from id Tech and highly-customized by Arkane Studios. Designed to support world-class art direction and take full advantage of the powerful hardware this generation has to offer, the Void Engine allows for significant advances to all game systems, including responsive stealth and combat Artificial Intelligence, lighting and graphical rendering, impressively dense urban environments, and story presentation.

Name: Spelunky 2
Description:
Spelunky returns in this greatly-expanded sequel to the original roguelike platformer! Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family. Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. A Bigger and More Dynamic World, with So Much to See and Do Spelunky 2's world is even denser than the one in the original game, offering many more areas, characters, traps, and items, as well as new ways to interact with them (and for them to interact with each other). The world has expanded in other ways, too, with branching paths and multi-layered levels adding a third dimension to the classic 2d platforming. Animals can also be tamed and ridden. And dynamic liquid physics create new challenges and make the world feel extra reactive and alive. Build a Community, Make Friends Back in Base Camp, characters you unlock will mill about and relax between runs, offering encouragement and advice. As you explore, your camp will expand and develop into a thriving little community to welcome you whenever you need a break from exploring. While there, you can also access shortcuts and practice your moves in safety. The Game is Yours to Explore Spelunky 2 is not just about 'getting good and beating the game' - more than that, it's an endlessly replayable playground to experiment in and find your own way, creating stories against the backdrop of an expansive, deeply-interactive world filled with secrets. The more you play, the more the game becomes yours! Key Features, Summarized: A Bigger World with all new areas, monsters, traps, and items! An Extra Dimension is added by allowing players to access a second layer behind the normal playfield. The second layer might contain treasure rooms, hidden passages, and other special places. Multiple Routes Through the Game will add variety and give players more ways to personalize a run. Find and Ride Mounts (like turkeys!) that have special abilities. Enemies may ride mounts, as well! New NPCs that you can help, hurt, or ignore… to make each run feel even more like a unique story. Variations and Changes to Classic Spelunky Concepts like shops and ghosts that will make veteran players rethink their strategies. Improved Liquid Physics allow water and lava to move and pour realistically, which drastically affects the playfield (and looks cool) Deadly Poison and Curses can be inflicted on players and enemies alike. Build a Permanent Home at Base Camp as you do runs and explore the caves. Improved Lighting and Special Effects are paired with richer visual and audio design. Deeper Mysteries that may require a community effort to unravel. Possibly More Eggplants

Name: Braid
Description:
Braid is a puzzle-platformer, drawn in a painterly style, where you can manipulate the flow of time in strange and unusual ways. From a house in the city, journey to a series of worlds and solve puzzles to rescue an abducted princess. In each world, you have a different power to affect the way time behaves, and it is time's strangeness that creates the puzzles. The time behaviors include: the ability to rewind, objects that are immune to being rewound, time that is tied to space, parallel realities, time dilation, and perhaps more. Braid treats your time and attention as precious; there is no filler in this game. Every puzzle shows you something new and interesting about the game world. Key features: Newly added Steam Cloud support Save your in-progress game to the cloud, then play where you left off from on any Steam connected computer. Forgiving yet challenging gameplay: Braid is a 2-D platform game where you can never die and never lose. Despite this, Braid is challenging — but the challenge is about solving puzzles, rather than forcing you to replay tricky jumps. Rich puzzle environment: Travel through a series of worlds searching for puzzle pieces, then solving puzzles by manipulating time: rewinding, creating parallel universes, setting up pockets of dilated time. The gameplay feels fresh and new; the puzzles are meant to inspire new ways of thinking. Aesthetic design: A painterly art style and lush, organic soundtrack complement the unique gameplay. Nonlinear story: A nonlinear fiction links the various worlds and provides real-world metaphors for your time manipulations; in turn, your time manipulations are projections of the real-world themes into playful 'what-if' universes where consequences can be explored. Nonlinear gameplay: The game doesn't force you to solve puzzles in order to proceed. If you can't figure something out, just play onward and return to that puzzle later.

Name: N++ (NPLUSPLUS)
Description:
N++ is a fast-paced, momentum-based platformer about darting around obstacles, narrowly evading enemies and collecting gold in a beautiful minimalist landscape. It’s the first N game on PC since 2004 and we’ve spent those 12 years perfecting the platformer. N++ is all about using your momentum to complete levels and get high scores, but in this sci-fi world, there’s a slew of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots trying to prevent you from completing your goal. Through the hand-crafted (NOT procedurally generated) levels, you’ll experience platforming at its most intense. Using only your fluid movement, you need to ‘solve’ each level and get to the exit. In addition to the lengthy and challenging single player campaign, we’ve packed a ton of features into this one last entry in the N series including: -4,340 hand-made levels -Custom Levels, Level Editor & Global Level Sharing -Leaderboards and replays for every level (even the ones you make) -Local Co-op Mode (up to 4 players) -Local Competitive Mode (up to 4 Players) -Hardcore Mode, an intense single-player challenge which only the best ninjas will survive -Intense, hidden Secret challenges to discover -63 tracks by top electronic artists -119 different color palettes let you customize the game’s look and keep it fresh every time you play -and more! Play a little, or a lot -- there's no skill ceiling, so you can always get better and better. N++ is a game that has enough bite-sized gameplay to last you a lifetime.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Name: Grapple Dog
Description:
About Grapple Dog is an exhilarating 2D pixel-art platformer. Use your awesome grappling hook to clear tricky challenges as Pablo, the Grapple Dog! Sail across 6 colourful worlds with a crew of fearless adventurers to stop the robotic overlord Nul from destroying the world! Features 🐶 Exhilarating action – Jumping! Swinging! Collecting gems! Dogs! Grapples! Driving a little boat around! And most exciting of all, dog petting! 🐕 6 colourful worlds – Sail across the map to explore 6 worlds, featuring 33 levels filled with hidden collectibles to find, secret areas to investigate, spectacular boss battles to overcome, and bonus levels to master 🐕‍🦺 Go, go, Grapple Dog! – A lighthearted adventure with tons of fun characters, you play as Pablo, the Grapple Dog! Sail with your merry band of fearless adventurers on your quest to stop the robotic overlord Nul from destroying the world 🐩 Play your way – Hone your grapple skills with optional collectibles and a testing speedrun Time Trial mode, or utilise the many in-built accessibility options to play without restrictions – have fun however you see fit 🪝 Bold & funky – A bold, colourful art style from a pixel art veteran makes Grapple Dog pop from start to finish, with a funky fresh soundtrack that’s sure to stick in your head, and buttery smooth 60fps gameplay

Name: Celeste
Description:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall.
